text.en: Each time a unit from your army with this ability is selected to fight, select one of the Ka’tah Stances below. Until that unit has finished making its attacks, the selected Stance is active for it and it gains the relevant ability:
Melee weapons equipped by models in this unit have the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability.
Melee weapons equipped by models in this unit have the **[LETHAL HITS]** ability.

Each time a model in an **ADEPTUS CUSTODES** unit from your army (excluding **VEHICLES**) makes an attack, if there are no other friendly units within 6" of that unit, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll.

At the start of your Command phase, select one unit from your opponent’s army. Until the start of your next Command phase, each time a model in an **ADEPTUS CUSTODES CHARACTER** unit from your army makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, add 1 to the Wound roll.

■ While an **ADEPTUS CUSTODES VEHICLE** unit from your army is at Starting Strength, unless that unit is an **AIRCRAFT** or it is Battle‑shocked, add 2 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit.
■ While an **ADEPTUS CUSTODES VEHICLE** unit from your army is below Starting Strength, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, re‑roll a Hit roll of 1.
■ While an **ADEPTUS CUSTODES VEHICLE** unit from your army is Below Half‑strength, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, re‑roll a Hit roll of 1 and re‑roll a Wound roll of 1.
Add 2" to the Move characteristic of models in **ADEPTUS CUSTODES WALKER** units from your army and add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls made for such units.

Friendly Adeptus Custodes Walker units:
  • Have +2" M.
  • Have +1 to advance rolls and charge rolls.
This detachment has the Armoury tag and cannot be taken with another Armoury detachment.
text.de:
Befreundete Adeptus-Custodes-Läufer-Einheiten:
  • haben +2" B.
  • haben +1 auf Vorrückenwürfe und Angriffswürfe.
Dieses Kontingent hat die Kennzeichnung Arsenal und kann nicht zusammen mit einem anderen Kontingent mit der Kennzeichnung ­Arsenal gewählt werden.
text.es:
Las unidades Bípode Adeptus Custodes amigas:
  • Tienen +2" a M.
  • Tienen +1 a las tiradas de avanzar y de carga.
Este destacamento tiene la etiqueta Armería y no puede incluirse junto a otro destacamento Armería.
text.fr:
Les unités de Marcheur de l’Adeptus Custodes amies :
  • Ont +2" en M.
  • Ont +1 aux jets d’avance et aux jets de charge.
Ce détachement a l’étiquette Armurerie et ne peut pas être pris avec un autre détachement d’Armurerie.
text.it:
Le unità di Camminatori degli Adeptus Custodes amiche:
  • Hanno +2" M.
  • Hanno +1 ai tiri per avanzare e +1 ai tiri per caricare.
Questo distaccamento ha il descrittore Arsenale e non può essere preso con un altro distaccamento Arsenale.
text.ja:
味方皇帝近衛団・ウォーカー・ユニットは：
  • 【移】に+2mvの修正を受ける。
  • 全力移動ロールおよび突撃ロールに+1の修正を受ける。
このデタッチメントは武具庫タグを持ち、他の武具庫タグを持つデタッチメントと同時に編制できない。
text.ko:
아군 아뎁투스 쿠스토데스 보행체 유닛에 다음을 적용합니다.
  • 이동 +2"
  • 급속 이동 굴림 및 돌격 굴림 +1
이 디태치먼트에 무기고 태그가 부여되며 다른 무기고 디태치먼트와 함께 선택할 수 없습니다.
text.zh:
己方帝皇禁军机甲单位：
  • M 属性 +2。
  • 突进掷骰与冲锋掷骰 +1。
本分遣队拥有武库标签，并且不能与另一个武库分遣队被一同纳入军队中。

text.en:
• When a friendly Anathema Psykana unit is selected to make an advance move, that advance move does not prevent that unit from being eligible to start an action.
  • Friendly Anathema Psykana units have the following ability:
Ceaseless Vigilance: In your Shooting phase, this unit can select one visible enemy unit within 12". That enemy unit is nulled:
  • While a unit is nulled, that unit has +3" detection range.
text.de:
• Wenn eine befreundete Anathema-Psikana-Einheit gewählt wird, eine Vorrückenbewegung auszuführen, verhindert jene Vorrückenbewegung nicht, dass jene Einheit infrage kommt, eine Aktion zu beginnen.
  • Befreundete Anathema-Psikana-Einheiten haben folgende Fähigkeit:
Unablässige Wacht: In deiner Fernkampfphase kann diese Einheit eine für sie sichtbare feindliche Einheit innerhalb von 12" wählen. Jene feindliche Einheit ist unterdrückt:
  • Solange eine Einheit unterdrückt ist, hat sie +3" Entdeckungsreichweite.
text.es:
• Cuando una unidad Anathema Psykana amiga se elija para hacer un movimiento de avanzar, esto no le impide ser apta para iniciar acciones.
  • Las unidades Anathema Psykana amigas tienen esta habilidad:
Vigilancia incesante: En tu fase de disparo, esta unidad puede elegir 1 unidad enemiga visible y a 12" o menos de ella. Esa unidad enemiga está anulada:
  • Mientras una unidad esté anulada, tiene +3" al alcance de detección.
text.fr:
• Quand une unité de l’Anathema Psykana amie est choisie pour faire un mouvement d’avance, ce dernier ne l’empêche pas d’être éligible pour entreprendre une action.
  • Les unités de l’Anathema Psykana amies ont aptitude suivante :
    • Vigilance Perpétuelle : À votre phase de Tir, cette unité peut choisir une unité ennemie visible et à 12" ou moins. Ladite unité ennemie est nullifiée :
  • Tant qu’une unité est nullifiée, elle a +3" en portée de détection.
text.it:
• Quando un’unità dell’Anathema Psykana amica viene scelta per effettuare un movimento di avanzata, tale movimento di avanzata non impedisce a quell’unità di essere idonea a iniziare un’azione.
  • Le unità dell’Anathema Psykana amiche hanno la seguente abilità:
Vigilanza Incessante: nella tua fase di Tiro questa unità può scegliere un’unità nemica visibile entro 12". Quell’unità nemica è silenziata:
  • Fintanto che un’unità è silenziata, quell’unità ha +3" alla distanza di individuazione.
text.ja:
• 味方アナテマ・サイカナ・ユニットは全力移動を行った場合でも、アクションの開始を宣言できる。
  • 味方異能討滅局・ユニットは以下のアビリティを持つ：
絶え間なき警戒：自軍側射撃フェイズ中、このユニットの12mv以内に一部でも入っており、視認可能な敵ユニットを1個選択できる。選択された敵ユニットは失調状態になる：
  • ユニットが失調状態である間、そのユニットの発見範囲は+3mvの修正を受ける。
text.ko:
• 아군 아나테마 사이카나 유닛이 급속 이동 수행을 위해 지정되었을 때, 그 급속 이동에도 불구하고 특수 행동 시작이 가능합니다.
  • 아군 아나테마 사이카나 유닛에 다음 능력을 부여합니다.
끝없는 경계: 플레이어의 사격 페이즈에, 이 유닛의 12" 내에 있으며 시야에 들어온 적 유닛 하나를 지정합니다. 그 적 유닛은 부존화됩니다.
  • 유닛이 부존화된 동안에는, 그 유닛에 발각 범위 +3"를 적용합니다.
text.zh:
• 当一个己方巫咒单位被选择进行一次突进移动时，那次突进移动不会阻止该单位开始一次行动。
  • 己方巫咒单位拥有以下技能。
无休警戒：在己方射击阶段中，该单位可以选择一个位于其 12" 内的可见敌方单位。那个敌方单位被麻木化：
  • 在一个单位被麻木化时，那个单位的侦测范围 +3"。

text.en:
At the start of the battle round, you can select one of the bullet points below. If you do, until the start of the next battle round, that bullet point’s effects apply.

■ Each time an **ADEPTUS CUSTODES** model from your army with the Martial Ka’tah ability makes a melee attack, a successful unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

■ Improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of melee weapons equipped by **ADEPTUS CUSTODES** models from your army with the Martial Ka’tah ability by 1.
If a friendly Adeptus Custodes Terminator unit made an ingress move this turn, that unit can re‑roll charge rolls. This detachment has the LIONS tag and cannot be taken with another LIONS detachment.
text.de: Wenn eine befreundete Adeptus-Custodes-Terminator-Einheit in diesem Zug eine Einsatzbewegung ausgeführt hat, können Angriffswürfe für sie wiederholt werden. Dieses Kontingent hat die Kennzeichnung Löwen und kann nicht zusammen mit einem anderen Kontingent mit der Kennzeichnung Löwen gewählt werden.
text.es: Toda unidad Exterminador Adeptus Custodes amiga que hizo algún movimiento de inserción en este turno puede repetir sus tiradas de carga. Este destacamento tiene la etiqueta LEONES y no puede incluirse junto a otro destacamento LEONES.
text.fr: Si une unité de Terminator de l’Adeptus Custodes amie a fait un mouvement d’arrivée à ce tour, elle peut relancer les jets de charge. Ce détachement a l'étiquette LIONS et ne peut pas être pris avec un autre détachement de LIONS.
text.it: Se un’unità Terminator degli Adeptus Custodes amica ha effettuato un movimento di inserzione in questo turno, può ripetere i tiri per caricare. Questo distaccamento ha il descrittore Leoni e non può essere preso con un altro distaccamento Leoni.
text.ja: 味方皇帝近衛団・ターミネイター・ユニットが突入移動を行っていた場合、そのユニットは突撃ロールをリロールしてもよい。 このデタッチメントはライオンの子らタグを持ち、他のライオンの子らタグを持つデタッチメントと同時に編制できない。
text.ko: 아군 아뎁투스 쿠스토데스 터미네이터 유닛이 이번 턴에 진입 이동을 수행했다면, 그 유닛은 돌격 굴림을 재굴림할 수 있습니다. 이 디태치먼트에 사자 태그가 부여되며 다른 사자 디태치먼트와 함께 선택할 수 없습니다.
text.zh: 如果一个己方帝皇禁军终结者单位在本回合中进行了一次入场移动，那么那个单位可以重掷冲锋掷骰。 本分遣队拥有狮群标签，并且不能与另一个拥有狮群标签的分遣队被一同纳入军队中。

text.en:
• (Once per turn, per army) One friendly Tristraen's Gilded Blades unit can re-roll a battle-shock roll.
  • When playing a Combat Patrol battle, the following friendly units must start the battle in strategic reserves and cannot be set up on the battlefield before the battle round stated. When doing so, they must be set up wholly within your deployment zone.
    • Gilded Blades Custodian Wardens: Battle round 2.
    • Gilded Blades Allarus Custodians: Battle round 3.
text.de:
• (Einmal pro Zug, pro Armee) Für eine befreundete Tristraens-Goldklingen-Einheit kann ein Erschütterungswurf wiederholt werden.
  • Wenn du eine Kampfpatrouille-Schlacht spielst, müssen die folgenden befreundeten Einheiten die Schlacht in strategischer Reserve beginnen und können nicht vor der angegebenen Schlachtrunde auf dem Schlachtfeld aufgestellt werden. Wenn du sie aufstellst, müssen sie vollständig innerhalb deiner Aufstellungszone platziert werden.
    • Goldklingen-Custodeshüter: Schlachtrunde 2.
    • Goldklingen-Allarus-Custodes: Schlachtrunde 3.
text.es:
• (Una vez por turno, por ejército) Una unidad Espadas Doradas de Tristraen amiga puede repetir una tirada de acobardamiento.
  • Al jugar una batalla de Patrulla, las siguientes unidades amigas deben comenzar la batalla en la reserva estratégica y no pueden desplegarse en el campo de batalla antes de la ronda de batalla indicada. Al hacerlo, deben desplegarse completamente en tu zona de despliegue.
    • Protectores Custodios Espadas Doradas: Ronda de batalla 2.
    • Custodios Allarus Espadas Doradas: Ronda de batalla 3.
text.fr:
• (Une fois par tour, par armée) Une unité des Lames Dorées de Tristraen amie peut relancer un jet d'ébranlement.
  • Lorsque vous jouez une bataille de Patrouille, les unités amies suivantes doivent commencer la bataille en réserve stratégiques et ne peuvent pas être placées sur le champ de bataille avant le round spécifié. Ce faisant, elles doivent être placées entièrement dans votre zone de déploiement.
    • Veilleurs Custodiens des Lames Dorées: 2e round de bataille.
    • Custodiens Allarus des Lames Dorées: 3e round de bataille.
text.it:
• (Una volta per turno, per armata) Un’unità delle Lame Dorate di Tristraen amica può ripetere un tiro per i traumi.
  • Durante una partita Pattuglia da Combattimento, le seguenti unità amiche devono iniziare la battaglia nelle riserve strategiche e non possono essere schierate sul campo prima del round di battaglia indicato. Quando ciò avviene, devono essere schierate interamente entro la tua zona di dispiegamento.
    • Sentinelle Custodi delle Lame Dorate: Round di battaglia 2.
    • Custodi Allarus delle Lame Dorate: Round di battaglia 3.
text.ja:
• （アーミーごとに、各ターンにつき1回）味方トリストラエンの黄金の刃・ユニットは戦闘ショックロールをリロールできる。
  • コンバットパトロール形式のバトルをプレイしている場合、以下の味方ユニットはバトル開始時に戦略的予備戦力でなければならず、記載されたバトルラウンドより前に戦場へ配置することはできない。また、そのユニットを配置する際、自軍の初期配置ゾーン内に全体が収まるように配置しなければならない。
    • 黄金の刃・カストーディアン・ワーデン：第2バトルラウンド。
    • 黄金の刃・アラルス・カストーディアン：第3バトルラウンド。
text.ko:
• (군대를 통틀어 턴당 한 번) 아군 트리스트라엔의 금빛 검 유닛 하나가 전투충격 굴림을 재굴림할 수 있습니다.
  • 컴뱃 패트롤 전투를 플레이할 때, 다음 아군 유닛은 전략 예비대에서 전투를 시작해야만 하며, 명시된 전투 라운드 전까지는 전장에 놓을 수 없습니다. 그렇게 할 경우, 반드시 플레이어의 배치 구역에 완전히 들어오도록 놓아야 합니다.
    • 금빛 검 쿠스토디안 파수대: 2 전투 라운드
    • 금빛 검 알라루스 쿠스토디안: 3 전투 라운드
text.zh:
• （每支军队，每个回合限一次）一个己方崔斯蒂安的鎏金之刃单位可以重掷一次战斗震慑掷骰。
  • 在进行一局战斗巡逻队战斗时，以下己方单位在战斗开始时必须位于战略预备队中，并且在列有的战斗轮次开始前无法被部署至战场。在进行部署时，这些单位必须被部署在完全位于己方部署区内的位置。
    • 鎏金之刃禁军守卫: 战斗轮次 2。
    • 鎏金之刃阿拉鲁斯禁军：战斗轮次 3。

text.en:
In the Battle‑shock step of your opponent’s Command phase, if an enemy unit that is either a **PSYKER** unit or below its Starting Strength is within 12" of one or more **ANATHEMA PSYKANA** models from your army, that enemy unit must take a Battle‑shock test. If that unit is Below Half‑strength, it must subtract 1 from its Battle‑shock test this phase instead.

**Designer’s Note:** *This means that all enemy **PSYKER** units within range of this Aura ability and all enemy units within range of this Aura ability that have lost one or more models must take a Battle‑shock test in your opponent’s Command phase, not just those that are Below Half‑strength.*

**ANATHEMA PSYKANA** units from your army gain the following the ability:

**Null Aegis (Aura)**: While an **ADEPTUS CUSTODES** unit is within 6" of this unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability against Psychic Attacks and mortal wounds.

All other **ADEPTUS CUSTODES** units from your army gain the following ability:

**Deadly Unity (Aura)**: While an **ANATHEMA PSYKANA** unit is within 6" of this unit, each time a model in that **ANATHEMA PSYKANA** unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

name.ja: トリストラエンの黄金の刃

target.en: One **ADEPTUS CUSTODES** unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.

when.en: Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the **[PRECISION]** ability.

fluff.en: With every strike, the Lions of the Emperor prove themselves the masters of single combat, even when engaging the mightiest foes.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS CUSTODES VEHICLE** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets a model in your unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of your unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

fluff.en: The vehicles of the Adeptus Custodes are the finest examples of their kind. Their expertly wrought armoured forms contain ancient and esoteric technology, including auto‑repair subroutines and reactive field generators.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS CUSTODES** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6, adding 1 to the result if your unit has the **WALKER** keyword. On a 4+, do not remove it from play; The destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks (when doing so, it is assumed to have 1 wound remaining), and is then removed from play.

fluff.en: Even as death’s cold embrace falls upon them, Custodians vent the last of their wrath upon the foe.

target.en: That **ADEPTUS CUSTODES** unit.

when.en: Fight phase, just before an **ADEPTUS CUSTODES** unit from your army Piles In.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a Pile‑in move, it can move up to D3+3" instead of up to 3".

fluff.en: The golden‑armoured onslaught smashes through the enemy line, trapping the foe and preventing their escape.

target.en: That **ADEPTUS CUSTODES** model’s unit.

when.en: Any phase, just after a mortal wound has been allocated to an **ADEPTUS CUSTODES** model from your army (excluding **ANATHEMA PSYKANA** models).

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against mortal wounds.

fluff.en: The Adeptus Custodes are individually engineered on a molecular level using secrets of genetic alchemy that render them almost supernaturally resilient.

target.en: One **ANATHEMA PSYKANA** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.

effect.en: Select either the **[LETHAL HITS]** or **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability. Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in your unit have the selected ability, but models in your unit can only target **PSYKER** units with their attacks.

fluff.en: Null Maidens train to slay psykers with swift martial efficiency, for they know their prey have many weapons beyond just their powers and must not be allowed time or opportunity to employ them.

target.en: One **VIGILATORS** unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.

when.en: Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a melee attack, you can re‑roll the Hit roll. If the target of that attack is Battle‑shocked or a **PSYKER**, you can re‑roll the Wound roll as well.

fluff.en: The Vigilators train tirelessly in the art of the swift, beheading strike, with a particular emphasis on the swift elimination of enemy witches.

target.en: One **WITCHSEEKERS** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of Torrent weapons equipped by models in your unit. If such a weapon targets a **PSYKER** or Battle‑shocked unit this phase, add 2 to its Attacks characteristic instead.

fluff.en: Witchseekers know their role in combat is to spread indiscriminate carnage through the foe’s ranks.

target.en: Up to two **ADEPTUS CUSTODES INFANTRY** units from your army, and one enemy unit that is an eligible target for all of those units.

when.en: Your Shooting phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, your units can only target that enemy unit, but each time a model in one of your units makes a ranged attack, improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of that attack by 1.

restrictions.en: You can only select two units if one (and only one) of them is an **ANATHEMA PSYKANA** unit and both are within 6" of each other.

fluff.en: With practiced ease, the Talons of the Emperor establish vicious crossfires to cut the foe apart.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS CUSTODES** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks, and one friendly **ANATHEMA PSYKANA** unit within 6" of that **ADEPTUS CUSTODES** unit.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, your unit has the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against Psychic attacks and mortal wounds.

fluff.en: Null Maidens quash the manifestations of witches.

target.en: Up to two **ADEPTUS CUSTODES** units from your army that are within 8" of that enemy unit.

when.en: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.

effect.en: Your units can make a Normal move of up to 6".

restrictions.en: You cannot select units that are within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units. You can only select two units if one (and only one) of them is an **ANATHEMA PSYKANA** unit and both are within 6" of each other.

fluff.en: Every move the enemy makes only sees them fall.

target.en: Up to two **ADEPTUS CUSTODES** units from your army.

when.en: Start of the Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in one of your units targets an enemy unit that is below its Starting Strength, add 1 to the Wound roll.

restrictions.en: You can only select two units if one (and only one) of them is an **ANATHEMA PSYKANA** unit and both are within 6" of each other.

fluff.en: The Talons of the Emperor tear apart their prey.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS CUSTODES CHARACTER** unit from your army that has just destroyed the unit you selected at the start of your Command phase as the target of your Assemblage of Might ability.

when.en: Any phase.

effect.en: Select one enemy unit on the battlefield. Until the start of your next Command phase, each time an **ADEPTUS CUSTODES CHARACTER** model from your army makes an attack that target that enemy unit, add 1 to the Wound roll. In addition, if the destroyed unit was a **CHARACTER** unit, gain 1CP.

fluff.en: What foe can withstand a warrior who has so tested the defences of the Throneworld itself?

target.en: One **ADEPTUS CUSTODES CHARACTER** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, **CHARACTER** models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability.

fluff.en: In an age plagued by monsters, when primordial horrors from the darkest void circle Humanity’s dying light, still the Adeptus Custodes stand strong.

target.en: Up to two **ADEPTUS CUSTODES CHARACTER** units from your army that have not been selected to fight this phase.

when.en: Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a **CHARACTER** model in either of your units makes an attack that targets a **MONSTER** or **VEHICLE** unit, you can re‑roll the Hit roll and you can re‑roll the Wound roll.

fluff.en: To lay low the greatest and most terrible monsters and heretics is to earn new names for a Custodian’s mighty tally.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS CUSTODES CHARACTER** model from your army that is not leading a unit.

when.en: Your Movement phase, before the Reinforcements step.

effect.en: Select one friendly unit (excluding Battle-shocked and Attached units) within 2" horizontally and 5" vertically of your model that it could lead (as described in the Leader section of its datasheet). Your model attaches to that unit as a Leader. Change that unit’s Starting Strength accordingly.

fluff.en: The greatest Custodians know when it is both their duty and their right to command their comrades.

target.en: One **ANATHEMA PSYKANA INFANTRY** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks, and one other friendly **ADEPTUS CUSTODES INFANTRY** unit (excluding **ANATHEMA PSYKANA** units) within 6" of that **ANATHEMA PSYKANA INFANTRY** unit.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, any attack that targets your **ANATHEMA PSYKANA** unit must instead target your other **ADEPTUS CUSTODES** unit (unless it is not an eligible target).

fluff.en: It is second nature for Custodes to place themselves between their comrades and potential peril.

target.en: That **ADEPTUS CUSTODES WARLORD** model.

when.en: Any phase, just after an **ADEPTUS CUSTODES WARLORD** model from your army has used an ability on its datasheet or from an Enhancement that says it can only be used ‘Once per battle’.

effect.en: Your model can use its ‘Once per battle’ ability one additional time during this battle (but not in the same phase).

restrictions.en: You cannot use this Stratagem more than once per battle.

fluff.en: The greatest of the Custodians bring incredible reserves of stamina and ability to bear.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS CUSTODES CHARACTER** model from your army that was just destroyed and has not fought this phase. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.

when.en: Fight Phase.

effect.en: Do not remove your destroyed model from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making attacks, and is then removed from play.

fluff.en: The Custodes do not yield while their duty remains unfulfilled.

target.en: That **ADEPTUS CUSTODES CHARACTER** model.

when.en: Any phase, just after an **ADEPTUS CUSTODES CHARACTER** model from your army has used an ability on its datasheet that states it can only be used ‘once per battle’.

effect.en: Your model can use that ‘once per battle’ ability one additional time during the battle (but not in the same phase).

restrictions.en: You cannot use this Stratagem on the same **ADEPTUS CUSTODES CHARACTER** model more than once per battle.

fluff.en: The shining champions of the Adeptus Custodes are looked upon in awe by all who witness their grim arts. Their judgement is without flaw, and their tactical acumen utterly impeccable.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS CUSTODES** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6, adding 2 to the result if that model has the **CHARACTER** keyword. On a 4+, do not remove it from play; the destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks (when doing so, it is treated as having 1 wound remaining), and is then removed from play.

fluff.en: The harder the battle, and the heavier their losses, the more resolute the Lions of the Emperor become.

target.en: One **ALLARUS CUSTODIANS** or **AQUILON CUSTODIANS** unit from your army that is on the battlefield.

when.en: Your Command phase.

effect.en: That unit is split into separate units, each containing one model. These new units each have a Starting Strength of 1.

fluff.en: Heroic bands of Terminator‐armoured Custodians engage entire armies in unrelenting battle.

target.en: That **ADEPTUS CUSTODES** unit.

when.en: Your Movement phase, just after an **ADEPTUS CUSTODES** unit from your army Falls Back.

effect.en: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

fluff.en: The Adeptus Custodes are unrelenting in their advance, laying down punishing fire even as they manoeuvre to new positions.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS CUSTODES** unit from your army (excluding **VEHICLE** units) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.

effect.en: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6".

fluff.en: Although every Custodian is devastatingly fast on the battlefield, with preternatural reactions to match, the Lions of the Emperor are outstanding even among their peers.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS CUSTODES VEHICLE** or **ADEPTUS CUSTODES MOUNTED** unit from your army.

when.en: Your Movement phase or your Charge phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a move, it can move through terrain features.

fluff.en: Armoured in adamantine and possessed of furious machine spirits, the vehicles of the Adeptus Custodes are almost impossible to stop in their tracks.

target.en: That **ADEPTUS CUSTODES VEHICLE** unit.

when.en: Your Movement phase, just after an **ADEPTUS CUSTODES VEHICLE** unit from your army Advances.

effect.en: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Advanced. If your unit has the **WALKER** keyword, until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced instead.

fluff.en: Custodians coax wrathful fury from their war engines’ machine spirits to hunt down and eliminate their foes at speed.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS CUSTODES** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the **[IGNORES COVER]** ability, and until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to that attack’s Ballistic Skill characteristic and/or any or all modifiers to the Hit roll.

fluff.en: The Ten Thousand are relentless in pursuing the Emperor’s foes and thorough in their annihilation. No armour, sorcery or hiding place can shield an enemy from their wrath.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS CUSTODES** unit from your army (excluding **ANATHEMA PSYKANA** units) that is below its Starting Strength.

when.en: Start of the Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in your unit. If your unit is Below Half-strength, until the end of the phase, add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of those melee weapons instead.

fluff.en: The loss of a single Talon of the Emperor is commemorated by the tolling of the Bell of Lost Souls on Terra, and by their comrades’ bloody vengeance on the battlefield.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS CUSTODES INFANTRY** unit from your army (excluding **ANATHEMA PSYKANA** units) that is within range of an objective marker you control and that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a melee attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

fluff.en: Once the Custodians have laid claim to a location, they defend it with incredible tenacity and skill.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS CUSTODES** unit from your army that Fell Back this phase.

when.en: Your Movement phase.

effect.en: Until the end of your turn, that unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

fluff.en: So widely skilled and studied are the Custodians that, whatever situation they find themselves in, they have the martial wisdom to prevail.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS CUSTODES BATTLELINE** unit from your army (excluding **ANATHEMA PSYKANA** units) within range of an objective marker you control.

when.en: Your Movement phase.

effect.en: That objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

fluff.en: Simply because the Adeptus Custodes do not stand sentinel over a strategic location or asset, does not mean that it – or any who would threaten it – escapes their gaze.

target.en: One **ANATHEMA PSYKANA** unit from your army within 18" of that enemy **PSYKER** unit.

when.en: Any phase, just after an enemy **PSYKER** unit has either finished using a Psychic ability that targets a unit, or finished making Psychic Attacks.

effect.en: That enemy **PSYKER** unit must take a Leadership test. If the test is passed, that **PSYKER** unit is Battle‑shocked; if the test is failed that **PSYKER** unit suffers 3 mortal wounds and is Battle‑shocked.

fluff.en: To overcome the Null Maidens’ aura, enemy psykers overstretch themselves with horrible consequences.

target.en: One **PROSECUTORS** unit from your army that has just shot.

when.en: Your Shooting phase.

effect.en: Select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the start of your next turn, while your unit is on the battlefield, that enemy unit is prosecuted. While a unit is prosecuted, each time an **ANATHEMA PSYKANA** model makes an attack against that unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1. While a **PSYKER** or Battle‑shocked unit is prosecuted, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

fluff.en: Prosecutors can fire psy‑chaff bolts whose esoteric emissions weaken those targets not slain outright.

target.en: One **ANATHEMA PSYKANA INFANTRY** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, your unit has the Stealth ability, and Battle‑shocked and **PSYKER** models can only select your unit as a target of a ranged attack if they are within 12".

fluff.en: Enemies must overcome disorienting waves of revulsion in order to even focus upon Null Maidens.

target.en: Up to two **ADEPTUS CUSTODES** units from your army.

when.en: Start of your Movement phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the turn, your units are eligible to shoot and/or declare a charge in a turn in which they Fell Back.

restrictions.en: You can only select two units if one (and only one) of them is an **ANATHEMA PSYKANA** unit and both are within 6" of each other.

fluff.en: Custodians and Null Maidens cover one another seamlessly as they manoeuvre to corner their prey.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS CUSTODES** unit from your army (excluding **ANATHEMA PSYKANA** units) that has not been selected to shoot this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase.

effect.en: Select either the **[LETHAL HITS]** or **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability. Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the selected ability.

fluff.en: The Shield Hosts have access to stockpiles of ancient and incredibly rare weaponry and ammunition.

target.en: That <k>Adeptus Custodes Walker</k> unit.
target.fr: Cette unité de <k>Marcheur</k> de l’<k>Adeptus Custodes</k>.
target.ja: その<k>皇帝近衛団・ウォーカー</k>・ユニット。
target.zh: 那个<k>帝皇禁军机甲</k>单位。

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, when an enemy unit targets a friendly <k>Adeptus Custodes Walker</k> unit.
when.de: In der Fernkampfphase deines Gegners oder in der Nahkampfphase, wenn eine feindliche Einheit eine befreundete <k>Adeptus</k>-<k>Custodes</k>-<k>Läufer</k>-Einheit als Ziel wählt
when.es: En la fase de disparo del oponente o en la fase de combate, cuando una unidad enemiga tome como blanco una unidad <k>Bípode Adeptus Custodes</k> amiga.
when.fr: À la phase de Tir adverse ou à la phase de Combat, quand une unité ennemie cible une unité de <k>Marcheur</k> de l’<k>Adeptus Custodes</k> amie.
when.it: Nella fase di Tiro dell’avversario o nella fase di Combattimento, quando un’unità nemica sceglie come bersaglio un’unità <k>Camminatore</k> degli <k>Adeptus Custodes</k> amica.
when.ja: 敵軍側射撃フェイズ中、あるいは任意の白兵フェイズ中、敵ユニットが味方<k>皇帝近衛団・ウォーカー</k>・ユニットを攻撃対象に選択した時。
when.ko: 상대의 사격 페이즈 또는 백병전 페이즈, 적 유닛이 아군 <k>아뎁투스 쿠스토데스 보행체</k> 유닛을 대상으로 지정했을 때.
when.zh: 您对手的射击阶段或者近战阶段中，在一个敌方单位将一个己方<k>帝皇禁军机甲</k>单位选择成为攻击目标时。

effect.en: Attacks that target your unit with a S greater than your unit’s T have -1 to wound rolls.
effect.de: Attacken gegen deine Einheit mit einer S, die höher ist als der W deiner Einheit, haben -1 auf Verwundungswürfe.
effect.es: Los ataques que tomen como blanco tu unidad con una F mayor que la R de tu unidad tienen -1 a las tiradas para herir.
effect.fr: Les attaques qui ciblent votre unité et dont la F est supérieure à l’E de votre unité ont -1 aux jets de blessure.
effect.it: Gli attacchi che hanno come bersaglio la tua unità con una Fo maggiore della R della tua unità hanno -1 ai tiri per ferire.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットを対象とした攻撃の【攻】が、その自軍ユニットの【耐】を上回っている場合、その攻撃のウーンズロールは-1の修正を受ける。
effect.ko: 이 유닛을 대상으로 지정한 공격의 위력이 이 유닛의 내구보다 높다면, 그 공격에 타격 굴림 -1을 적용합니다.
effect.zh: 当对该己方单位的攻击的 S 属性大于该单位的 T 属性时，攻击的致伤掷骰结果 -1。

fluff.en: Adeptus Custodes Dreadnoughts possess expertly wrought armoured forms that contain ancient and esoteric technology, including auto‑repair subroutines and reactive field generators.
fluff.de: Die Dreadnoughts des Adeptus Custodes verfügen über meisterlich gefertigte gepanzerte Rümpfe, die uralte und rätselhafte Technik enthalten, darunter automatische Reparatur-Subroutinen und reaktive Feldgeneratoren.
fluff.es: Las formas blindadas de los Dreadnoughts de los Custodes, expertamente forjadas, contienen tecnología antigua y esotérica, incluidas subrutinas de autorreparación y generadores de campos reactivos.
fluff.fr: Conçu avec expertise, le blindage des Dreadnoughts de l’Adeptus Custodes renferme une technologie ancienne et ésotérique, qui comprend des sous-routines d’auto-réparation et des générateurs de champ réactifs.
fluff.it: I Dreadnought degli Adeptus Custodes sono sapientemente costruiti e incorporano tecnologie antiche ed esoteriche, incluse subroutine di autoriparazione e generatori di campo reattivi.
fluff.ja: 皇帝近衛団のドレッドノートには古代の難解なる科学技術が用いられており、自動修復サブルーティンや誘発式フィールド発生装置が備わっている。
fluff.ko: 아뎁투스 쿠스토데스 드레드노트에는 자동수리 서브루틴과 반응장 발생기 등 고대의 신비한 기술이 장인의 뛰어난 솜씨로 내장되어 있다.
fluff.zh: 帝皇禁军的无畏机甲拥有工艺精湛的装甲躯体和神秘的古老科技，这包括了自动修复程序和反应式力场生成器。

target.en: That <k>Adeptus Custodes Walker</k> unit.
target.fr: Cette unité de <k>Marcheur</k> de l’<k>Adeptus Custodes</k>.
target.ja: その<k>皇帝近衛団・ウォーカー</k>・ユニット。
target.zh: 那个<k>帝皇禁军机甲</k>单位。

when.en: Your Movement phase, when a friendly Adeptus Custodes Walker unit is selected to move.
when.de: Deine Bewegungsphase, wenn eine befreundete Adeptus-Custodes-Läufer-Einheit zum Bewegen gewählt wird
when.es: En tu fase de movimiento, cuando una unidad Bípode Adeptus Custodes amiga se elija para mover.
when.fr: À votre phase de Mouvement, quand une unité de Marcheur de l’Adeptus Custodes amie est choisie pour se déplacer.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Movimento, quando un’unità Camminatore degli Adeptus Custodes amica viene scelta per muoversi.
when.ja: 自軍側移動フェイズ中、味方皇帝近衛団・ウォーカー・ユニットが移動を宣言した時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 이동 페이즈, 아군 아뎁투스 쿠스토데스 보행체 유닛이 이동 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때.
when.zh: 在您的移动阶段中，当一个己方帝皇禁军机甲单位被选择进行移动时。

effect.en: Your unit has <k>Mobile</k>.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットは<k>高機動</k>を持つ。

fluff.en: Even the most formidable obstacles give way to the ancient warriors of the Moritoi, ruptured and trampled underfoot or barged aside with howl of empowered servos.
fluff.de: Selbst die stabilsten Hindernisse müssen vor den uralten Kriegern der Moritoi weichen; sie werden zerschlagen und zertrampelt oder unter dem Aufkreischen kraftvoller Servomotoren beiseitegeschoben.
fluff.es: Incluso los obstáculos más formidables ceden ante los antiguos guerreros de los Moritoi, destrozados, pisoteados, o apaleados por poderosos servos aullantes.
fluff.fr: Même les obstacles les plus redoutables font place aux vénérables guerriers des Moritoi, brisés et piétinés ou poussés de côté dans le hurlement de servomoteurs puissants.
fluff.it: Neanche gli ostacoli più formidabili riescono a fermare gli antichi guerrieri Moritoi, che li frantumano sotto i piedi o li sbalzano via tra gli stridii dei servomeccanismi potenziati.
fluff.ja: いかなる頑強な障害物も、いにしえのモリトイの戦士たちの前には脆くも崩れ、蹂躙され、強化サーボの唸り声と共に押しのけられていく。
fluff.ko: 그 어떤 대단한 장애물이라 할지라도, 모리토이의 고대 전사들은 길을 뚫고 나간다. 앞을 막는 것은 파열하거나, 밟아 으스러뜨리거나, 강화 서보의 포효로 내팽개칠 뿐이다.
fluff.zh: 在亡者结社的古老战士们面前，就连最为坚固的障碍都不值一提，它们在伺服马达的声响下被碾碎或者推开。

target.en: That <k>Telemon Heavy Dreadnought</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>テレモン・ヘヴィドレッドノート</k>・ユニット。
target.zh: 那个<k>特拉蒙重型无畏机甲</k>单位。

when.en: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly Telemon Heavy Dreadnought unit is selected to shoot.
when.de: Deine Fernkampfphase, wenn eine befreundete Schwerer-Telemon-Dreadnought-Einheit zum Schießen gewählt wird
when.es: En tu fase de disparo, cuando una unidad Dreadnought Pesado Telemon amiga se elige para disparar.
when.fr: À votre phase de Tir, quand une unité de Dreadnought Lourd Telemon amie est choisie pour tirer.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Tiro, quando un’unità Dreadnought Pesante Telemon amica viene scelta per tirare.
when.ja: 自軍側射撃フェイズ中、味方テレモン・ヘヴィドレッドノート・ユニットが射撃を宣言した時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 사격 페이즈, 아군 텔레몬 중형 드레드노트 유닛이 사격 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때.
when.zh: 在您的射击阶段中，当一个己方特拉蒙重型无畏机甲单位被选择进行射击时。

effect.en:
Your unit’s:
  • Arachnus Storm Cannon weapons have [Rapid Fire 6].
  • Iliastus Accelerator Culverin weapons have [Rapid Fire 2].
effect.de:
Für deine Einheit gilt:
  • Arachnus-Sturmkanone-Waffen haben [Schnellfeuer 6].
  • Iliastus-Beschleunigerkalverine-Waffen haben [Schnellfeuer 2].
effect.es:
Aplica estos puntos:
  • Las armas Cañón tormenta Arachnus de tu unidad tienen [Fuego rápido 6].
  • Las armas Culebrina aceleradora Iliastus de tu unidad tienen [Fuego rápido 2].
effect.fr:
Les armes :
  • Canon Tempête Arachnus de votre unité ont [Tir Rapide 6].
  • Couleuvrine Accélératrice Iliastus de votre unité ont [Tir Rapide 2].
effect.it:
Le armi della tua unità hanno le seguenti abilità:
  • Le armi cannone Tempesta Arachnus hanno [Cadenza Rapida 6].
  • Le armi colubrina Accelerator Iliastus hanno [Cadenza Rapida 2].
effect.ja:
その自軍ユニットの：
  • アラクナス・ストームキャノン武器は［ラピッドファイア6］を持つ。
  • イリアストゥス・アクセラレイター・カルヴァリン武器は［ラピッドファイア2］を持つ。
effect.ko:
이 유닛에 다음을 적용합니다.
  • 아라크누스 스톰포 무기에 [속사 6] 부여
  • 일리아스투스 가속 컬버린 무기에 [속사 2] 부여
effect.zh:
您的单位的：
  • 蛛形风暴加农炮武器拥有 [速射 6]。
  • 伊利亚图斯加速炮武器拥有[速射 2]。

fluff.en: When lauded Telemon pilots turn their pitiless optics upon a proximal threat, the storm of accelerated firepower that ensues leaves naught but smoking ruin.
fluff.de: Wenn die ehrbaren Piloten eines Telemon-Dreadnoughts ihre mitleidslose Aufmerksamkeit auf ein nahes Ziel richten, entfesseln sie eine Feuerkraft, die dafür sorgt, dass nichts als qualmende Überreste bleiben.
fluff.es: Cuando los aclamados pilotos Telemon dirigen sus despiadadas miras hacia una amenaza inminente, la tormenta de fuego que se produce no deja más que ruinas humeantes.
fluff.fr: Lorsque les fameux pilotes de Telemon tournent leurs optiques impitoyables sur une menace proche, la grêle de projectiles accélérés qui s’ensuit veille à ce qu’il n’en reste que débris fumants.
fluff.it: Quando i prestigiosi piloti dei Telemon inquadrano nel mirino un pericolo nelle vicinanze, scatenano una tempesta di fuoco accelerato che si lascia alle spalle solo rovine fumanti.
fluff.ja: 崇敬を受けしテレモン・ドレッドノートの搭乗者は、迫り来る脅威に対して無慈悲に照準を向けると、加速射出された弾薬の嵐が解き放たれ、跡には煙を上げる残骸のみが残される。
fluff.ko: 텔레몬 조종사들이 근방의 위협으로 그 자비없는 시선을 돌린 후, 뒤따르는 신속한 화력의 폭풍은 오직 연기와 폐허만을 남긴다.
fluff.zh: 特拉蒙的无畏驾驶者将无情的目光转向最近的威胁，如同狂风暴雨般的火力将确保目标化为乌有。

target.en: That <k>Prosecutors</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>プロセキューター</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly Prosecutors unit is selected to shoot.
when.de: Deine Fernkampfphase, wenn eine befreundete Prosecutoren-Einheit zum Schießen gewählt wird
when.es: En tu fase de disparo, cuando una unidad Perseguidoras amiga se elige para disparar.

when.zh: 在您的射击阶段中，当一个己方审判修女单位被选择进行射击时。

  • [Rapid Fire 2].
  • +1 AP.
effect.es:
Los Bólteres de tu unidad tienen:
  • [Fuego rápido 2].
  • +1 a FP.
effect.fr:
Les Bolters de votre unité ont :
  • [Tir Rapide 2].
  • +1 en PA.
effect.it:
Le armi fucile requiem della tua unità hanno:
  • [Cadenza Rapida 2].
  • +1 VP.
effect.ja:
自軍ユニットの「ボルトガン」武器は：
  • ［ラピッドファイア2］を持つ。
  • 【貫】に+1の修正を受ける。
effect.ko:
이 유닛의 볼트건 무기에 다음을 적용합니다.
  • [속사 2] 부여
  • 관통 +1
effect.zh:
您的单位的爆矢枪武器拥有：
  • [速射 2]。
  • +1 AP。

fluff.en: When they have cornered their quarry at close range, Prosecutors fire their Umbra-pattern bolters in rapid bursts that sow strings of armour-shredding shots amongst the enemy.
fluff.de: Wenn Prosecutoren ihre Beute in die Enge getrieben haben, geben sie schnelle Feuerstöße mit ihren Boltern des Umbra-Schemas ab, die in solcher Kadenz leicht Rüstung durchschlagen.
fluff.es: Cuando han acorralado a su presa a corta distancia, las Perseguidoras destruyen al enemigo con rápidas ráfagas de sus bólteres clase Umbra.
fluff.fr: Lorsqu’elles ont acculé leur cible à courte portée, les Prosecutors ouvrent le feu avec leurs bolters modèle Umbra et tissent les lignes de projectiles perforants à travers l’ennemi.
fluff.it: Messa all’angolo la preda in corpo a corpo, le Prosecutor sparano raffiche in rapida sequenza con i requiem modello Umbra bersagliando i nemici con sfilze di proiettili.
fluff.ja: 至近で追い詰められた獲物に対し、プロセキューターはアンブラ型ボルターを怒涛の連射で放ち、装甲をも裂く猛射を敵へ浴びせる。
fluff.ko: 이행자들은 사냥감이 근거리에 들어올 정도로 몰아넣고 나면, 적의 갑옷이 너덜너덜해질 정도로 빠르게 움브라 패턴 볼터를 점사한다.
fluff.zh: 在将目标包围至近距离后，审判修女们使用手中的暗影型爆矢枪进行连射，将敌人淹没在穿甲弹幕之中。

target.en: That <k>Witchseekers</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>ウィッチシーカー</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly Witchseekers unit is selected to shoot.
when.de: Deine Fernkampfphase, wenn eine befreundete Hexenjägerinnen-Einheit zum Schießen gewählt wird
when.es: En tu fase de disparo, cuando una unidad Buscabrujas amiga se elige para disparar.
when.fr: À votre phase de Tir, quand une unité de Répurgatrices amie est choisie pour tirer.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Tiro, quando un’unità di Cercatrici di Streghe amica viene scelta per tirare.
when.ja: 自軍側射撃フェイズ中、味方ウィッチシーカー・ユニットが射撃を宣言した時。

when.zh: 在您的射击阶段中，当一个己方寻巫修女单位被选择进行射击时。

effect.en: Your unit’s <k>[Torrent]</k> ranged attacks have <k>[Blast 1]</k>.
effect.es: Los ataques <k>[Ráfaga]</k> a distancia de tu unidad tienen <k>[Área 1]</k>.
effect.fr: Les attaques de tir à <k>[Torrent]</k> de votre unité ont <k>[Déflagration 1]</k>.
effect.it: Gli attacchi da tiro <k>[Torrenziali]</k> della tua unità hanno <k>[Area 1]</k>.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットの<k>［噴射］</k>射撃攻撃は<k>［ブラスト1］</k>を持つ。
effect.zh: 您的单位的<k>[洪流]</k>远程攻击拥有<k>[爆炸 1]</k>。

fluff.en: Coordinating through a rapid exchange of Thoughtmark, Witchseekers unleash a flesh-melting inferno of all-consuming promethium from their flamers.
fluff.de: Mittels eines schnellen Austausches in Gedankenzeichen koordinieren die Hexenjägerinnen mit ihren Flammenwerfern ein alles verzehrendes Inferno aus Promethium.
fluff.es: Coordinándose mediante un rápido intercambio de ideomarcas, las Buscabrujas desatan un infierno devorador de prometio con sus lanzallamas.
fluff.fr: Coordonnées par un bref échange de Pensée Mimique, les Répurgatrices déchaînent un brasier de prométhium grâce à leurs lance-flammes.
fluff.it: Coordinandosi con rapidi scambi di Tracciapensiero, le Cercatrici di Streghe sprigionano getti di promezio ardente dai lanciafiamme.
fluff.ja: ウィッチシーカーは、思考身話（ルビ、思考身話：ソートマーク）による迅速な交信を通じて連携する。フレイマーから放たれるプロメチウムは、肉をも溶かす業火ですべてを呑み込んでゆく。
fluff.ko: 재빠른 사유어로 전술을 조율한 사술색출자들이 화염방사기에서 프로메슘의 게걸스러운 염화를 쏟아낸다.
fluff.zh: 通过快速交换思维手语，寻巫修女能够同时用火焰喷射器释放出熔化血肉的火焰风暴。

target.en: That <k>Vigilators</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>ヴィジレイター</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Fight phase, when a friendly Vigilators unit is selected to fight.
when.de: Nahkampfphase, wenn eine befreundete <k>Vigilatoren</k>-Einheit zum Kämpfen gewählt wird
when.es: En la fase de combate, cuando una unidad Acechadoras amiga se elige para combatir.
when.fr: À la phase de Combat, quand une unité de Vigilators amie est choisie pour combattre.
when.it: Nella fase di Combattimento, quando un’unità di Vigilator amica viene scelta per combattere.
when.ja: 白兵フェイズ中、味方<k>ヴィジレイター</k>・ユニットが白兵を宣言した時。
when.ko: 백병전 페이즈, 아군 감시자 유닛이 백병전 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때.
when.zh: 在近战阶段中，当一个己方警戒修女单位被选择进行近战时。

effect.en:
• Your unit’s melee attacks have [Lance].
  • Your unit’s melee attacks that target a Psyker unit have +1 A.
effect.de:
• Die Nahkampfattacken deiner Einheit haben [Lanze].
  • Nahkampfattacken deiner Einheit gegen eine Psioniker-Einheit ­haben +1 A.
effect.es:
• Los ataques de combate de tu unidad tienen [Lanza].
  • Los ataques de combate de tu unidad que tomen como blanco una unidad Psíquico tienen +1 a A.
effect.fr:
• Les attaques de mêlée de votre unité ont [Lance].
  • Les attaques de mêlée de votre unité qui ciblent une unité de Psyker ont +1 en A.
effect.it:
• Gli attacchi da mischia della tua unità hanno [Lancia].
  • Gli attacchi da mischia della tua unità che hanno come bersaglio un’unità Psionica hanno +1 A.
effect.ja:
• その自軍ユニットの白兵攻撃は［ランス］を持つ。
  • その自軍ユニットの白兵攻撃がサイカー・ユニットを対象にしている場合、【数】に+1の修正を受ける。
effect.ko:
• 이 유닛의 백병전 공격에 [랜스]를 부여합니다.
  • 이 유닛의 백병전 공격이 사이커 유닛을 대상으로 지정하면, 그 공격에 공격 +1을 적용합니다.
effect.zh:
• 您的单位的近战攻击拥有[骑枪]。
  • 您的单位针对灵能者单位进行的近战攻击拥有 +1 A。

fluff.en: After stalking their sorcerous prey in silence, the charge of the Vigilators is accompanied by a keening song of death emitted by their scything greatblades as they are swept in eviscerating arcs.
fluff.de: Nachdem sie ihre magisch begabte Beute schweigsam verfolgt haben, wird der Angriff der Vigilatoren von einem hellen Lied des Todes begleitet, das von ihren scharfen Klingen ausgeht, wenn sie durch die Luft pfeifen.
fluff.es: Tras acechar en silencio a sus presas hechiceras, la carga de las Acechadoras se acompaña de un agudo canto de muerte emitido por sus grandes espadas guadañas al trazar arcos evisceradores.
fluff.fr: Après avoir traqué en silence leur proie adepte des arts occultes, les Vigilators accompagnent leur charge du chant de mort de leurs espadons qui décrivent des arcs sanglants.
fluff.it: Dopo aver seguito in silenzio la preda arcana, la carica dei Vigilator è accompagnata dallo spaventoso canto funebre intonato dalle loro grandilame che tracciano ampi archi.
fluff.ja: 静寂のなかで妖術師たる獲物を追い詰めたのち、ヴィジレイターは突撃する。その大鎌のごとき剣が振るわれるたび、引き裂く軌跡とともに鋭い死の哀歌が響き渡る。
fluff.ko: 감시자들이 마법사 표적을 은밀히 추적한 후 돌격한다. 적을 절단하기 위해 휘두르는 그 대검에서는 비통한 죽음의 노래가 울려퍼진다.
fluff.zh: 在无声地潜行追踪其施法猎物之后，警戒修女发起冲锋；伴随着他们的突击，手中那如镰刀般挥舞的巨刃划出一道道开膛破肚的弧光，奏响了一曲凄厉的死亡挽歌。

target.en: One friendly <k>ALLARUS CUSTODIANS</k>/<k>AQUILON CUSTODIANS</k> unit that is on the battlefield.
target.es: Una unidad <k>CUSTODIOS ALLARUS</k>/<k>CUSTODIOS AQUILON</k> amiga en el campo de batalla.
target.fr: Une unité de <k>CUSTODIENS ALLARUS</k>/<k>CUSTODIENS AQUILON</k> amie qui est sur le champ de bataille.
target.it: Un’unità di <k>Custodi Allarus</k>/<k>Custodi Aquilon</k> amica in campo.
target.ja: 戦場にいる味方<k>アラルス・カストーディアン/アクィロン・カストーディアン</k>・ユニット1個。
target.ko: 전장에 있는 아군 <k>알라루스 쿠스토디안</k>/<k>아퀼론 쿠스토디안</k> 유닛 하나.
target.zh: 一个位于战场上的己方<k>阿拉鲁斯禁军</k>/<k>天鹰禁军</k>单位。

when.en: Your Command phase.
when.fr: À votre la phase de Commandement.
when.ja: 自軍側指揮フェイズ中。

effect.en: Your unit is split into separate units, each containing one model. These new units each have a starting strength of 1.
effect.de: Deine Einheit wird in separate Einheiten aufgeteilt, von denen jede ein Modell enthält. Diese neuen Einheiten haben jeweils eine Sollstärke von 1.
effect.es: Tu unidad se divide en unidades separadas formadas cada una por 1 miniatura. Esas nuevas unidades tienen cada una unos efectivos iniciales de 1.
effect.fr: Votre unité est scindée en unités distinctes, chacune contenant une figurine. Ces nouvelles unités ont chacune un effectif initial de 1.
effect.it: La tua unità viene divisa in unità separate, ciascuna formata da un modello. Ognuna di queste nuove unità ha una Forza Iniziale di 1.
effect.ja: その自軍側ユニットは、兵1体で構成される複数のユニットに分割される。それらの新ユニットの初期兵数は1体である。
effect.ko: 이 유닛을 두 유닛으로 분리하며, 각 유닛은 모델 수는 1개입니다. 새로운 각 유닛은 1의 시작 전력을 보유합니다.
effect.zh: 您的单位被拆分成单独的单位，每个都包含一个模型。这些新单位的起始兵力都为 1。

fluff.en: Heroic bands of Terminator‑armoured Custodians engage entire armies in unrelenting battle.
fluff.de: Heroische Scharen aus Custodes in Terminatorrüstung gehen in erbarmungslosen Gefechten gegen ganze Armeen vor.
fluff.es: Heroicas bandas de Custodios con armaduras Exterminador se enfrentan sin titubear a ejércitos enteros.
fluff.fr: Des bandes héroïques de Custodiens en armure Terminator engagent un combat implacable contre des armées entirères.
fluff.it: Eroiche bande di Custodi in armatura Terminator affrontano intere armate in scontri accaniti.
fluff.ja: 滅殺装甲服を装備した近衛兵からなる英雄的な一団が、敵の軍勢をまるごと相手取って猛烈な戦いを繰り広げる。
fluff.ko: 터미네이터 갑주로 무장한 영웅적인 쿠스토디안 부대가 군대 규모의 적에게 거침없이 맞서 싸운다.
fluff.zh: 身披终结者装甲的英勇禁军正与整支敌军展开殊死搏杀。

target.en: That <k>Adeptus Custodes Terminator</k> unit.
target.fr: Cette unité de <k>Terminator</k> de l’<k>Adeptus Custodes</k>.
target.ja: その<k>皇帝近衛団・ターミネイター</k>・ユニット。
target.zh: 那个<k>帝皇禁军终结者</k>单位。

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, when an enemy unit targets a friendly <k>Adeptus Custodes Terminator</k> unit.
when.de: In der Fernkampfphase deines Gegners oder in der Nahkampfphase, wenn eine feindliche Einheit eine befreundete <k>Adeptus</k>-<k>Custodes</k>-<k>Terminator</k>-Einheit als Ziel wählt
when.es: En la fase de disparo del oponente o en la fase de combate, cuando una unidad enemiga tome como blanco una unidad <k>Exterminador Adeptus Custodes</k> amiga.
when.fr: À la phase de Tir adverse ou à la phase de Combat, quand une unité ennemie cible une unité de <k>Terminator</k> de l’<k>Adeptus Custodes</k> amie.
when.it: Nella fase di Tiro dell’avversario o nella fase di Combattimento, quando un’unità nemica sceglie come bersaglio un’unità <k>Terminator</k> degli <k>Adeptus Custodes</k> amica.
when.ja: 敵軍側射撃フェイズ中、あるいは任意の白兵フェイズ中、敵ユニットが味方<k>皇帝近衛団・ターミネイター</k>・ユニットを攻撃対象に選択した時。
when.ko: 상대의 사격 페이즈 또는 백병전 페이즈, 적 유닛이 아군 <k>아뎁투스 쿠스토데스 터미네이터</k> 유닛을 대상으로 지정했을 때.
when.zh: 您对手的射击阶段或者近战阶段中，在一个敌方单位将一个己方<k>帝皇禁军终结者</k>单位选择成为攻击目标时。

effect.en: Your unit has +1 T.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットの【耐】は+1の修正を受ける。

fluff.en: Steeling their souls and bracing their indomitable armour, heavily girded Custodians will cleave to their duty and reject attempts to cut them down.
fluff.de: Die schwer gepanzerten Custodes stählen ihre Herzen und stemmen dem Feind ihre wuchtige Macht entgegen; sie erfüllen ihre Pflicht und verweigern sich jedem Versuch, sie zu fällen.
fluff.es: Con almas férreas y protegidos por indomables armaduras, los Custodios, fuertemente armados, se aferrarán a su deber y rechazarán cualquier intento de aniquilarlos.
fluff.fr: Déterminés et engoncés dans une armure inviolable, les Custodiens les plus lourdement protégés accompliront leur devoir tout en tenant l’adversaire en échec.
fluff.it: Rafforzando il proprio animo e affidandosi alle formidabili armature, i Custodi compiono il loro dovere e resistono a qualsiasi tentativo di annientarli.
fluff.ja: 魂を静謐に、不壊の装甲服を身構えながら、カストーディアンたちは責務に忠実に従い、自らを打ち倒そうと挑みかかる者たちを退け続ける。
fluff.ko: 의지를 굳히고 불굴의 갑주를 단단히 매어 중무장한 쿠스토디안은 자신을 베려는 시도를 무위로 돌리고 임무를 향해 적을 베어가르며 진격한다.
fluff.zh: 身穿重甲的禁军坚定意志并准备迎击，他们坚持遵循自己的使命，拒绝被任何攻击击倒。
