when.zh: 在您的射击阶段中，当一个己方帝皇禁军终结者单位被选择进行射击时。

effect.en: Your unit’s Ballistus Grenade Launcher weapons have D3+3 A.
effect.de: Die Ballistus-Granatwerfer-Waffen deiner Einheit haben W3+3 A.
effect.es: Las armas lanzagranadas ballistus de tu unidad tienen 1D3+3 a A.
effect.fr: Les Lance-grenades Ballistus de votre unité ont D3+3 en A.
effect.it: Le armi lanciagranate Ballistus della tua unità hanno A D3+3.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットのバリストゥス・グレネードランチャー武器の【数】はD3+3になる。
effect.ko: 이 유닛의 발리스투스 유탄발사기 무기의 공격을 D3+3로 변경합니다.
effect.zh: 您的单位的强弩榴弹发射器武器拥有 D3+3 A。

fluff.en: A concussive barrage of specialist grenades enables Allarus Custodians to maximise the destructive potential of their arm-mounted launchers against their massed enemies.
fluff.de: Eine betäubende Salve spezialisierter Granaten erlaubt den Allarus-Custodes, das zerstörerische Potential ihrer armmontierten Werfer gegen massierte Feinde zu maximieren.
fluff.es: Una descarga de granadas especializadas permite a los Custodios Allarus maximizar el potencial destructivo de sus lanzagranadas contra la masa enemiga.
fluff.fr: Un barrage de grenades spécialisées permet aux Custodiens Allarus de maximiser le potentiel destructeur de leurs lance-grenades brachiaux contre les ennemis en nombre.
fluff.it: Un enorme bombardamento di granate specialistiche consente ai Custodi Allarus di massimizzare il potenziale distruttivo dei lanciagranate montati sul braccio contro i nemici ammassati.
fluff.ja: アラルス・カストーディアンは腕部搭載ランチャーから衝撃グレネード特殊弾頭を斉射することで、密集した敵に対して最大限の破壊力を発揮する。
fluff.ko: 알라루스 쿠스토디안은 팔에 장착한 발사기의 파괴적인 성능을 끌어내기 위해 특수 진탕 유탄의 세례를 뭉쳐 있는 적에게 퍼붓는다.
fluff.zh: 通过连续发射特殊榴弹，阿拉鲁斯亲卫的腕部榴弹发射器能够对大群敌人造成最大程度的杀伤。

target.en: That <k>Tristraen's Gilded Blades</k> unit.
target.fr: Cette unité des <k>Lames Dorées de Tristraen</k>.
target.ja: その<k>トリストラエンの黄金の刃</k>・ユニット。
target.zh: 那个<k>崔斯蒂安的鎏金之刃</k>单位。

when.en: Fight phase, when a friendly Tristraen's Gilded Blades unit is selected to make a consolidation move.
when.de: Nahkampfphase, wenn eine befreundete Tristraens-Goldklingen-Einheit gewählt wird, eine Neuordnenbewegung auszuführen
when.es: En la fase de combate, cuando una unidad Espadas Doradas de Tristraen amiga se elija para hacer un movimiento de consolidar.
when.fr: À la phase de Combat, quand une unité des Lames Dorées de Tristraen amie est choisie pour faire un mouvement de consolidation.
when.it: Nella fase di Combattimento, quando un’unità delle Lame Dorate di Tristraen amica viene scelta per effettuare un movimento di consolidamento.
when.ja: 白兵フェイズ中、味方トリストラエンの黄金の刃・ユニットが再編移動を宣言した時。
when.ko: 백병전 페이즈, 아군 트리스트라엔의 금빛 검 유닛이 규합 이동 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때.
when.zh: 在近战阶段中，当一个己方崔斯蒂安的鎏金之刃单位被选中进行重整移动时。

effect.en: When making that consolidation move, your unit can move up to D3+3".
effect.de: Wenn deine Einheit jene Neuordnenbewegung ausführt, kann sie sich bis zu W3+3" weit bewegen.
effect.es: Al hacer ese movimiento de consolidar, tu unidad puede mover hasta 1D3+3".
effect.fr: En faisant ce mouvement de consolidation, votre unité peut se déplacer de D3+3" maximum.
effect.it: Quando effettui quel movimento di consolidamento la tua unità può muoversi di massimo D3+3".
effect.ja: その再編移動を行う時、選択された味方ユニットはD3+3mvまで移動できる。
effect.ko: 그 규합 이동을 수행할 때, 이 유닛은 최대 D3+3"만큼 이동할 수 있습니다.
effect.zh: 在进行重整移动时，您的单位可以最多移动 D3+3"。

fluff.en: Lunging with irresistible fury and speed, the Custodians pierce the enemy battle line and drive deep to deliver the killing thrust.
fluff.de: Die Custodes stürzen sich mit unaufhaltsamer Schnelligkeit und Wut in den Kampf und durchdringen die feindlichen Linien, um den Todesstoß in ihr Herz zu tragen.
fluff.es: Embistiendo con furia y velocidad irresistibles, los Custodios atraviesan la línea de batalla enemiga para asestar la estocada mortal.
fluff.fr: Animés d’une vivacité et d’une fureur irrésistible, les Custodiens percent le dispositif ennemi et s’enfoncent pour porter le coup fatal.
fluff.it: Gettandosi in avanti rapidi e furibondi, i Custodi trafiggono i nemici in prima linea e assestano il colpo di grazia.
fluff.ja: 何者にも止められぬ勢いと速さで突撃するカストーディアンは敵の戦列を突き破り、決定的な一撃を与えるべく敵陣深くへと潜り込む。
fluff.ko: 억누를 길 없는 분노와 속도로 돌진하는 쿠스토디안은 적의 전선은 물론 목표물까지 꿰뚫는다.
fluff.zh: 禁军以势不可挡的狂怒与迅捷猛扑而出，刺穿敌军战线，长驱直入，挥出致命的一击。

target.en: One friendly unengaged Tristraen's Gilded Blades Blade Champion unit that lost a wound as a result of those attacks.
target.de: Eine nicht im Nahkampf befindliche befreundete Tristraens-Goldklingen-Klingenchampion-Einheit, die durch jene Attacken mindestens einen Lebenspunkt verloren hat
target.es: Una unidad Campeón de Filo Espadas Doradas de Tristraen amiga no trabada que haya perdido alguna herida a causa de esos ataques.
target.fr: Une unité de Champion des Lames des Lames Dorées de Tristraenamie non engagée qui a perdu un ou plusieurs points de vie à cause de ces attaques.
target.it: Un’unità di Campione della Lama delle Lame Dorate di Tristraen amica non ingaggiata che ha perso una ferita come conseguenza di quegli attacchi.
target.ja: それらの攻撃で【負傷限界】を失った味方の非接敵状態であるトリストラエンの黄金の刃・ブレイドチャンピオン・ユニット。
target.ko: 그 공격으로 인해 체력을 잃었으며 교전 상태가 아닌 아군 트리스트라엔의 금빛 검의 용사 유닛 하나.
target.zh: 因为那些攻击而失去一点耐伤的一个不处于交战状态的己方崔斯蒂安的鎏金之刃利刃勇士单位。

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, when an enemy unit has shot.
when.de: Fernkampfphase deines Gegners, nachdem eine feindliche Einheit geschossen hat
when.es: En la fase de disparo del oponente, cuando una unidad enemiga haya disparado.
when.fr: À la phase de Tir adverse, quand une unité ennemie a tiré.
when.it: Nella fase di Tiro dell’avversario, dopo che un’unità nemica ha tirato.
when.ja: 敵軍射撃フェイズ中、敵ユニットが射撃を行なった時。
when.ko: 상대의 사격 페이즈, 적 유닛이 사격을 수행했을 때.
when.zh: 在您对手的射击阶段中，在一个敌方单位完成射击后。

effect.en: Your unit can make a surge move of up to D6+1".
effect.de: Deine Einheit kann eine Ansturmbewegung von bis zu W6+1" Zoll ausführen.
effect.es: Tu unidad puede hacer un movimiento súbito de hasta 1D6+1".
effect.fr: Votre unité peut faire un mouvement d’élan de D6+1" maximum.
effect.it: La tua unità può effettuare un movimento d’impeto di massimo D6+1".
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットは、最大D6+1mvまでの進撃移動を1回行える。
effect.ko: 이 유닛이 최대 D6+1"의 쇄도 이동을 수행할 수 있습니다.
effect.zh: 您的单位可以进行一次最多 D6+1" 的迸发移动。

fluff.en: As incoming fire strikes his auramite plate, Tristraen of the Gilded Blades advances towards his assailants with vengeance in mind.
fluff.de: Als das eingehende Feuer gegen seine Auramitpanzerung prasselt, stürmt Tristraen von den Goldklingen mit Vergeltung im Sinn auf seine Angreifer zu.
fluff.es: Mientras el fuego enemigo impacta su armadura de auramita, Tristraen de las Espadas Doradas avanza hacia sus asaltantes con solo la venganza en mente.
fluff.fr: Alors même que les tirs tintent sur sa plate d’auramite, Tristraen des Lames Dorées marche sur ses assaillants pour assouvir sa vengeance.
fluff.it: Anche quando i proiettili colpiscono la sua corazza in auramite, Tristraen delle Lame Dorate avanza verso i nemici bramoso di vendetta.
fluff.ja: 降り注ぐ射撃がそのオーラマイト装甲を打つ中、トリストラエンの黄金の刃は報復を胸に、なおも敵へと前進する。
fluff.ko: 적의 사격이 아우라마이트 판갑을 두드리자, 금빛 검의 트리스트라엔은 복수심을 품고는 공격자를 향해 발을 옮긴다.
fluff.zh: 在枪弹的攻击击中耀金护甲的时候，崔斯蒂安会立即冲向攻击他的敌人并展开复仇。

target.en: That <k>Tristraen's Gilded Blades</k> unit.
target.fr: Cette unité des <k>Lames Dorées de Tristraen</k>.
target.ja: その<k>トリストラエンの黄金の刃</k>・ユニット。
target.zh: 那个<k>崔斯蒂安的鎏金之刃</k>单位。

when.en: Fight phase when a friendly Tristraen's Gilded Blades unit that is below starting strength is selected to fight.
when.de: Nahkampfphase, wenn eine befreundete Tristraens-Goldklingen-Einheit unter Sollstärke zum Kämpfen gewählt wird
when.es: En la fase de combate, cuando una unidad Espadas Doradas de Tristraen amiga que esté por debajo de sus efectivos iniciales se elija para combatir.
when.fr: À la phase de Combat, quand une unité de Lames Dorées de Tristraen amie qui est en dessous de son effectif initial est choisie pour combattre.
when.it: Nella fase di Combattimento, quando un’unità delle Lame Dorate di Tristraen amica sotto la sua forza iniziale viene scelta per combattere.
when.ja: 白兵フェイズ中、初期兵数を下回っている味方トリストラエンの黄金の刃・ユニットが白兵を宣言した時。
when.ko: 백병전 페이즈, 시작 전력 미만인 아군 트리스트라엔의 금빛 검 유닛이 백병전 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때.
when.zh: 在近战阶段中，当一个低于起始兵力的己方崔斯蒂安的鎏金之刃单位被选择进行近战时。

effect.en: Your unit's melee attacks have +1 A.
effect.es: Los ataques de combate de tu unidad tienen +1 a A.
effect.fr: Les attaques de mêlée de votre unité ont +1 en A.
effect.it: Gli attacchi da mischia della tua unità hanno +1 A.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットの白兵攻撃の【数】は+1の修正を受ける。
effect.zh: 您的单位的近战攻击拥有 +1 A。

fluff.en: When comrades fall around them, the Custodians’ fury reaches new heights, and they fight with all the savagery and violence of cornered lions.
fluff.de: Wenn in ihrer Nähe Kameraden zu Boden gehen, erreicht die Wut der Custodes neue Höhen und sie kämpfen mit aller Wildheit und Brutalität von in die Enge getriebenen Löwen.
fluff.es: Cuando sus camaradas caen a su alrededor, la furia de los Custodios alcanza nuevas cotas, y luchan con el salvajismo y la violencia de leones acorralados.
fluff.fr: Quand leurs camarades tombent autour d’eux, les Custodiens redoublent de fureur, et ils se battent avec la violence farouche des lions acculés.
fluff.it: Quando i compagni cadono, i Custodi vengono animati da una furia totale che li spinge a combattere con la violenza e la ferocia di leoni in gabbia.
fluff.ja: 同胞が次々と倒れる中、カストーディアンの怒りはさらに高まり、追い詰められた獅子に比すべき凶暴さと暴威をもって戦う。
fluff.ko: 곁의 동지들이 쓰러질 때, 쿠스토디안의 분노는 형언할 수가 없다. 그는 궁지에 몰린 사자의 흉포함과 폭력으로 싸운다.
fluff.zh: 随着同伴的陨落，禁军们的怒火会变得更加猛烈，仿佛被逼至死路的狮子一般展开残暴野蛮的攻击。

name.ja: サイクアウト・グレネード（アップグレード）

description.en:
Anathema Psykana unit only.
  • This unit has Explosives.
  • When you target this unit with the Explosives stratagem, if you select an enemy Psyker unit, you can re-roll rolls to determine whether that enemy unit suffers a mortal wound.
description.de:
Nur für eine Anathema-Psikana-Einheit.
  • Diese Einheit hat Sprengsätze.
  • Wenn du die Gefechtsoption Sprengsätze mit dieser Einheit als Ziel einsetzt und eine feindliche Psioniker-Einheit wählst, kannst du Würfe wiederholen, die bestimmen, ob jene feindliche Einheit eine tödliche Verwundung erleidet.
description.es:
Solo unidad Anathema Psykana.
  • Esta unidad tiene Explosivos.
  • Cuando tomes esta unidad como blanco de la estratagema Explosivos, si eliges una unidad Psíquico enemiga, puedes repetir las tiradas para determinar si esa unidad enemiga sufre alguna herida mortal.
description.fr:
Unité de l’Anathema Psykana seulement.
  • Cette unité a le mot-clé Explosifs.
  • Quand vous ciblez cette unité avec le stratagème Explosifs, si vous choisissez une unité de Psyker ennemie, vous pouvez relancer les jets pour déterminer le nombre de blessures mortelles que l’unité ennemie subit.
description.it:
Solo unità dell'Anathema Psykana.
  • Questa unità ha Esplosivi.
  • Quando scegli questa unità come bersaglio dello Stratagemma Esplosivi, se scegli un'unità Psionica nemica puoi ripetere i tiri per determinare se quell'unità nemica subisce una ferita mortale.
description.ja:
異能討滅局・ユニットのみ。
  • このユニットは爆発物を持つ。
  • 自軍がこのユニットを対象に『爆発物』策略を使用した時、その効果で敵サイカー・ユニットを選択した場合、自軍はその敵ユニットが受ける致命的ダメージの量を決定するダイスをリロールしてもよい。
description.ko:
아나테마 사이카나 유닛 전용.
  • 이 유닛에 폭발물을 부여합니다.
  • 이 유닛을 폭발물 스트라타젬의 대상으로 지정할 때, 적 사이커 유닛을 지정한다면, 그 유닛이 치명상을 입을지 결정하는 굴림을 재굴림할 수 있습니다.
description.zh:
仅限巫咒单位。
  • 该单位拥有炸药关键词。
  • 在您对该单位使用炸药计谋时，如果您选择了一个敌方灵能者单位，那么您在判断对那个单位是否造成致命伤时可以进行重掷。

name.ja: オーラマイトの棺（アップグレード）

description.en: Adeptus Custodes Walker unit only. When you target this unit with the Crushing Impact stratagem, that use is -1 CP.
description.de: Nur für eine Adeptus-Custodes-Läufer-Einheit. Wenn du die Gefechtsoption Zerschmetternder Aufprall mit dieser Einheit als Ziel einsetzt, kostet jener Einsatz -1 BP.
description.es: Solo unidad Bípode Adeptus Custodes. Cuando tomes esta unidad como blanco de la estratagema Impacto aplastante, ese uso cuesta 1 PM menos.
description.fr: Unité de Marcheur de l’Adeptus Custodes seulement. Quand vous ciblez cette unité avec le stratagème Impact Écrasant, cette utilisation se fait à -1 PC.
description.it: Solo unità Camminatore degli Adeptus Custodes. Quando scegli questa unità come bersaglio dello stratagemma Impatto Devastante, quell’utilizzo costa 1 PC in meno.
description.ja: 皇帝近衛団・ウォーカー・ユニットのみ。自軍が、このユニットを対象に『激突』策略を使用する場合、そのCPコストは-1される。
description.ko: 아뎁투스 쿠스토데스 보행체 유닛 전용. 이 유닛을 충각 스트라타젬의 대상으로 지정할 때, CP 소모 -1을 적용합니다.
description.zh: 仅限帝皇禁军机甲单位。当您对该单位使用粉碎冲击计谋时，那次计谋消耗的 CP -1。

description.en: Anathema Psykana model only. When both players have deployed their armies, you can redeploy up to three friendly Anathema Psykana Infantry units. When doing so, you can set those units up in strategic reserves, regardless of how many units are already in strategic reserves.
description.de: Nur für ein Anathema-Psikana-Modell. Wenn beide Spieler ihre Armeen aufgestellt haben, kannst du bis zu drei befreundete Anathema-Psikana-­Einheiten neu aufstellen. Wenn du dies tust, kannst du jene Einheiten in die strategische Reserve versetzen, unabhängig davon, wie viele Einheiten sich bereits in der strategischen Reserve befinden.
description.es: Solo miniatura Anathema Psykana. Cuando ambos jugadores hayan desplegado sus ejércitos, puedes redesplegar hasta 3 unidades Infantería Anathema Psykana amigas. Al hacerlo, puedes colocarlas en la reserva estratégica, independientemente de cuántas unidades ya estén ahí.
description.fr: Figurine de l’Anathema Psykana seulement. Une fois que les deux joueurs ont déployé leurs armées, vous pouvez redéployer trois unités d’ Infanterie de l’Anathema Psykana amies maximum. Ce faisant, vous pouvez placer ces unités en réserve stratégique, quel que soit le nombre d’unités s’y trouvant déjà.
description.it: Solo modelli dell’Anathema Psykana. Dopo che entrambi i giocatori hanno dispiegato le proprie armate, puoi dispiegare nuovamente fino a tre unità di Fanteria dell’Anathema Psykana amiche. Quando lo fai, puoi schierare quelle unità nelle riserve strategiche, indipendentemente da quante unità si trovino già nelle riserve strategiche.
description.ja: アナテマ・サイカナ・兵のみ。双方のプレイヤーが自軍の初期配置を行った時、自軍は味方アナテマ・サイカナ・インファントリー・ユニットを最大3個まで再配置してもよい。再配置を行う際に、望むならば選択したユニットを戦略的予備戦力に配置してもよい。これらのユニットは、自軍が戦略的予備戦力に配置可能なユニットの上限個数にかかわらず、戦略的予備戦力に配置できる。
description.ko: 아나테마 사이카나 모델 전용. 양측이 각자의 군대를 배치한 다음, 플레이어는 최대 3개의 아군 아나테마 사이카나 보병 유닛을 재배치할 수 있습니다. 이때 그 유닛은 전략 예비대에 이미 편성된 유닛의 수와 상관없이 전략 예비대에 넣을 수 있습니다.
description.zh: 仅限巫咒模型。在双方玩家部署了自己的军队后，您可以重新部署最多三个己方巫咒步兵单位。在这么做时，您可以将这些单位放入战略预备队中，无论战略预备队中已经存在多少单位。

name.ja: 秘伝の奥義（アップグレード）

description.en:
Adeptus Custodes Walker unit only. This unit’s attacks can:
  • Re‑roll hit rolls of 1.
  • Re‑roll wound rolls of 1.
description.de:
Nur für eine Adeptus-Custodes-Läufer-Einheit. Für die Attacken dieser Einheit können:
  • Trefferwürfe von 1 wiederholt werden.
  • Verwundungswürfe von 1 wiederholt werden.
description.es:
Solo unidad Bípode Adeptus Custodes. En los ataques de esta unidad se puede:
  • Repetir las tiradas para impactar de 1.
  • Repetir las tiradas para herir de 1.
description.fr:
Unité de Marcheur de l’Adeptus Custodes seulement. Les attaques de cette unité peuvent :
  • Relancer les jets de touche de 1.
  • Relancer les jets de blessure de 1.
description.it:
Solo unità di Camminatori degli Adeptus Custodes. Gli attacchi di questa unità possono:
  • Ripetere i tiri per colpire pari a 1.
  • Ripetere i tiri per ferire pari a 1.
description.ja:
皇帝近衛団・ウォリアー・ユニットのみ。このユニットの攻撃は以下が可能になる：
  • ヒットロールの出目1をリロールする。
  • ウーンズロールの出目1をリロールする。
description.ko:
아뎁투스 쿠스토데스 보행체 유닛 전용. 이 유닛의 공격에 다음을 적용합니다.
  • 값이 1인 명중 굴림 재굴림
  • 값이 1인 타격 굴림 재굴림
description.zh:
仅限帝皇禁军机甲单位。该单位的攻击可以：
  • 重掷结果为 1 的命中掷骰。
  • 重掷结果为 1 的致伤掷骰。

description.en: Adeptus Custodes Terminator model only. In your first Movement phase, this unit can make an ingress move.
description.de: Nur für ein Adeptus-Custodes-Terminator-Modell. Diese Einheit kann in deiner ersten Bewegungsphase eine Einsatzbewegung ausführen.
description.es: Solo miniatura Exterminador Adeptus Custodes. En tu primera fase de movimiento, esta unidad puede hacer un movimiento de inserción.
description.fr: Figurine de Terminator de l’Adeptus Custodes seulement. À votre première phase de Mouvement, cette unité peut faire un mouvement d’arrivée.
description.it: Solo modelli Terminator degli Adeptus Custodes. Nella tua prima fase di Movimento questa unità può effettuare un movimento di inserzione.
description.ja: 皇帝近衛団・ターミネイター・兵のみ。自軍側の最初の移動フェイズ中、このユニットは突入移動を行える。
description.ko: 아뎁투스 쿠스토데스 터미네이터 모델 전용. 플레이어의 첫 번째 이동 페이즈에, 이 유닛은 진입 이동을 수행할 수 있습니다.
description.zh: 仅限帝皇禁军终结者模型。在第一个己方移动阶段中，该单位可以进行一次入场移动。

description.en: Adeptus Custodes Terminator model only. (Once per turn, per army) In your opponent’s Shooting phase, when an enemy unit has shot, if this unit lost a wound as a result of those attacks, this unit can make a surge move of up to D6+1".
description.de: Nur für ein Adeptus-Custodes-Terminator-Modell. (Einmal pro Zug, pro Armee) In der Fernkampfphase deines Gegners kann diese Einheit, nachdem eine feindliche Einheit geschossen hat und diese Einheit durch jene Attacken mindestens einen Lebenspunkt verloren hat, eine Ansturmbewegung von bis zu W6+1" ausführen.
description.es: Solo miniatura Exterminador Adeptus Custodes. (Una vez por turno, por ejército) En la fase de disparo del oponente, cuando una unidad enemiga haya disparado, si esta unidad ha perdido alguna herida debido a esos ataques, esta unidad puede hacer un movimiento súbito de hasta 1D6+1".
description.fr: Figurine de Terminator de l’Adeptus Custodes seulement. (Une fois par tour, par armée) À la phase de Tir adverse, une fois qu’une unité ennemie a tiré, si cette unité a été touchée par ces attaques, elle peut faire un mouvement d’élan de D6+1" maximum.
description.it: Solo modelli di Terminator degli Adeptus Custodes. (Una volta per turno, per armata) Nella fase di Tiro dell’avversario, dopo che un’unità nemica ha tirato, se questa unità ha perso una ferita come conseguenza di quegli attacchi, questa unità può effettuare un movimento d’impeto di massimo D6+1".
description.ja: 皇帝近衛団・ターミネイター・兵のみ。（アーミーごとに、各ターンごとに1回限り）敵軍側射撃フェイズ中、敵ユニットが射撃を行った時、このユニットがそれらの攻撃で【負傷限界】を失ったならば、このユニットは最大D6+1mvまで進撃移動を行える。
description.ko: 아뎁투스 쿠스토데스 터미네이터 모델 전용. (군대를 통틀어 턴당 한 번) 상대의 사격 페이즈에, 적 유닛이 사격 수행을 종료하였으며 그 공격으로 인해 이 유닛이 체력을 잃었다면, 이 유닛은 최대 D6+1"의 쇄도 이동을 수행할 수 있습니다.
description.zh: 仅限帝皇禁军终结者模型。（每支军队，每回合限一次）在对手的射击阶段中，在一个敌方单位完成射击后，如果该单位因为那些攻击失去耐伤，那么该单位可以进行一次最多 D6+1" 的迸发移动。

description.en: Upgrade: Gilded Blades Allarus Custodians unit only. This unit has +1 to charge rolls.
description.de: Aufwertung: Nur für eine Goldklingen-Allarus-Custodes-Einheit. Diese Einheit hat +1 auf Angriffswürfe.
description.es: Talento: Solo unidad Custodios Allarus Espadas Doradas. Esta unidad tiene +1 a las tiradas de carga.
description.fr: Amélioration : Unité de Custodiens Allarus des Lames Dorées seulement. Cette unité a +1 aux jets de charge.
description.it: Miglioria: Solo unità di Custodi Allarus delle Lame Dorate. Questa unità ha +1 ai tiri per caricare.
description.ja: アップグレード：黄金の刃・アラルス・カストーディアン・ユニットのみ。このユニットの突撃ロールは+1の修正を受ける。
description.ko: 업그레이드: 금빛 검 알라루스 쿠스토디안 유닛 전용. 이 유닛에 돌격 굴림 +1을 적용합니다.
description.zh: 升级：仅限鎏金之刃阿拉鲁斯禁军单位。该单位的冲锋掷骰 +1。

description.en: Tristraen's Gilded Blades Blade Champion model only. When this unit ends a charge move, you can select one enemy unit engaged with this unit. If you do, that enemy unit makes a battle-shock roll, with -1 to that battle-shock roll.
description.de: Nur für ein Tristraens-Goldklingen-Klingenchampion-Modell. Nachdem diese Einheit eine Angriffsbewegung beendet hat, kannst du eine feindliche Einheit im Nahkampf mit dieser Einheit wählen. Wenn du dies tust, führt jene feindliche Einheit einen Erschütterungswurf mit -1 aus.
description.es: Solo miniatura Campeón de Filo Espadas Doradas de Tristraen. Cuando esta unidad termina un movimiento de carga, puedes elegir 1 unidad enemiga trabada con esta unidad. Si lo haces, esa unidad enemiga debe hacer una tirada de acobardamiento con -1 a la tirada.
description.fr: Figurine de Champion des Lames des Lames Dorées de Tristraen seulement. Quand cette unité finit un mouvement de charge, vous pouvez choisir une unité ennemie engagée avec elle. Dans ce cas, l’unité ennemie choisie fait un jet d’ébranlement, avec -1 à ce jet.
description.it: Solo modelli di Campione della Lama delle Lame Dorate di Tristraen. Quando questa unità termina un movimento di carica, puoi scegliere un’unità nemica ingaggiata con questa unità. Se lo fai, quell’unità nemica effettua un tiro per i Traumi, con -1 a quel tiro per i Traumi.
description.ja: トリストラエンの黄金の刃・ブレードチャンピオン・兵のみ。このユニットが突撃移動を終えた時、自軍はこのユニットと接敵状態である敵ユニットを1個選択してもよい。その場合、選択された敵ユニットは戦闘ショックロールを行う。その戦闘ショックロールは-1の修正を受ける。
description.ko: 트리스트라엔의 금빛 검 검의 용사 모델 전용. 이 유닛이 돌격 이동을 종료할 때, 이 유닛과 교전 상태인 적 유닛을 하나 지정할 수 있습니다. 그렇게 할 경우, 그 적 유닛이 전투충격 굴림을 수행합니다. 그 전투충격 굴림 값에는 -1을 적용합니다.
description.zh: 仅限崔斯蒂安的鎏金之刃利刃勇士模型。在该单位结束一次冲锋移动时，您可以选择一个与该单位处于交战状态的敌方单位。若选择，那个敌方单位需要进行一次战斗震慑掷骰，那次战斗震慑掷骰结果 -1。

description.en: **ADEPTUS CUSTODES** model only. Each time an attack targets the bearer’s unit, if the attacking model is within 12", subtract 1 from the Hit roll.
**ADEPTUS CUSTODES** model only. Each time the bearer makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.
**ADEPTUS CUSTODES** model only. The range of the bearer’s Null Aegis or Deadly Unity ability is increased to 9".
**ADEPTUS CUSTODES** model only. Once per turn, the first time a saving throw is failed for the bearer’s unit, change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 0.
**SHIELD‑CAPTAIN** model only. Add 1 to the Strength and Damage characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons.

**SHIELD‑CAPTAIN** model only. After both players have deployed their armies, you can select up to two **ADEPTUS CUSTODES** units from your army (excluding **ANATHEMA PSYKANA** units) and redeploy all of those units. When doing so, any of those units can be placed into Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.
**SHIELD‑CAPTAIN** or **BLADE CHAMPION** model only. Add 2 to the bearer’s Wounds characteristic.
**SHIELD‑CAPTAIN** or **BLADE CHAMPION** model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the **[IGNORES COVER]** ability.

**ANATHEMA PSYKANA** model only. Add 1 to the Attacks, Strength and Damage characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons. While the bearer is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy **PSYKER** units that are Battle‑shocked, add 2 to the Attacks, Strength and Damage characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons instead.

**ANATHEMA PSYKANA** model only. Each time an attack is allocated to the bearer, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack. If that attack was made by a **PSYKER** or Battle‑shocked model, change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 1 instead.
**ANATHEMA PSYKANA** model only. In your Command phase, select one enemy unit within 12" of the bearer. That unit must take a Battle‑shock test.

**ANATHEMA PSYKANA** model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll. If that attack targeted an enemy **PSYKER** unit, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

**ADEPTUS CUSTODES** model only. Each time the bearer’s unit ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of the bearer and roll one D6: on a 4+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds. Once per battle, after the bearer’s unit ends a Charge move, all enemy units within 6" of the bearer must take a Battle‑shock test.

**ADEPTUS CUSTODES** model only. The bearer has a Leadership characteristic of 5+. Once per battle, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly **ADEPTUS CUSTODES** unit that is Battle‑shocked and within 12" of the bearer; that unit is no longer Battle‑shocked.

**ADEPTUS CUSTODES** model only. Add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of the bearer’s melee weapons. Once per battle, at the start of any Command phase, triple the bearer’s Objective Control characteristic until the end of the turn.

**ADEPTUS CUSTODES** model only. The bearer’s unit is eligible to shoot and/or declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back. Once per battle, in your opponent's Movement phase, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 8" of the bearer, if the bearer's unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6".
**ADEPTUS CUSTODES** model only. Improve the Attacks, Strength and Damage characteristics of melee weapons equipped by the bearer by 1.
**ADEPTUS CUSTODES** model only. The bearer has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

**ADEPTUS CUSTODES VEHICLE** model only. While a friendly **ADEPTUS CUSTODES INFANTRY** or **ADEPTUS CUSTODES MOUNTED** unit is within 6" of the bearer, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, re‑roll a Hit roll of 1.

**ADEPTUS CUSTODES INFANTRY** or **ADEPTUS CUSTODES MOUNTED** model only. In your Command phase, select one **ADEPTUS CUSTODES VEHICLE** or **ADEPTUS CUSTODES MOUNTED** unit within 6" of the bearer. Until the start of your next Command phase, that unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

**ADEPTUS CUSTODES INFANTRY** model only. The first time the bearer is destroyed, roll one D6 at the end of the phase. On a 2+, set the bearer back up on the battlefield, as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, with its full wounds remaining.
**ADEPTUS CUSTODES** model only. The bearer has the Lone Operative and Stealth abilities.

**SHIELD‐CAPTAIN** model only. At the start of the Fight phase, until the end of the phase, add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer for every 5 enemy models within 6" of the bearer (rounding down).
**SHIELD‐CAPTAIN** model only. Improve the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer by 3, and improve the Armour Penetration and Damage characteristics of those weapons by 1.
Each time this unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in this unit.

Once per battle, in your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, if it is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6". If it does, until the end of the turn, this unit is not eligible to declare a charge.
If a model from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a **VERTUS PRAETORS** unit, it can be attached to this unit instead.

loadout.en: **Every model is equipped with:** lastrum bolt cannon; interceptor lance.

wargear.en: Any number of models can each have their lastrum bolt cannon replaced with one of the following: ◦ 1 adrathic devastator ◦ 1 twin las-pulsar

fluff.en: Agamatus Custodians take Gyrfalcon-pattern jetbikes as their steeds, the machines’ power supporting the heavy armour of their riders and the powerful lastrum bolt cannon or other arcane weaponry. Closing with the enemy, Agamatus Custodians unleash this firepower with precision, before dealing a death blow with their interceptor lances.

description.en: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Fights First ability.

While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll if that unit is below its Starting Strength, and add 1 to the Wound roll as well if that unit is Below Half-strength.
This model has the Feel No Pain 3+ ability against Psychic Attack and mortal wounds.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with**: Somnus.

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: Aleya is a veteran of her order and is a ferocious and dedicated hunter of witches and sorcerers. Over many years she has developed incredible tactical perception, as well as a deep knowledge of her quarry. She employs these skills to seek out rogue psykers, cutting them down with sweeps of her blade, Somnus.

leader.en: This model can be attached to the following units:  ■ **PROSECUTORS** ■ **VIGILATORS** ■ **WITCHSEEKERS**

description.en: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets a **CHARACTER**, **MONSTER** or **VEHICLE** unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

Once per battle, at the end of your opponent’s turn, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove it from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.
Add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in the bearer’s unit.

wargear.en: 1 model’s guardian spear can be replaced with 1 vexilla and 1 misericordia.
Any number of models can each have their guardian spear replaced with 1 castellan axe.

fluff.en: Even amongst the Adeptus Custodes, Allarus Custodians are renowned for their deeds. Teleporting into the most dangerous enemy strongholds, they rely upon the indomitable resilience of their Terminator plate to protect them as they hunt down demagogues and generals. Fighting as individual heroes, they swiftly tear the heart from their foe’s defence.

description.en: This model has the Feel No Pain 3+ ability against Psychic Attacks and mortal wounds.
At the start of your Command phase, this model regains 1 lost wound.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with**: storm bolter; armoured tracks.

wargear.en: This model can be equipped with 1 hunter-killer missile.

fluff.en: The Rhinos of the Silent Sisterhood are more than just armoured personnel carriers. Many have served the Imperium for hundreds, if not thousands of years. Highly rugged vehicles, their spacious capacity and powerful engines help them to safely carry their deadly cargo of Sisters into the fiercest of battles.

transport.en: This model has a transport capacity of 12 **ANATHEMA PSYKANA INFANTRY** models.

description.en: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets the closest eligible target, re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

Once per battle, at the end of your opponent’s turn, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove it from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.
If a model from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to an **ALLARUS CUSTODIANS** unit, it can be attached to this unit instead.

loadout.en: **Every model is equipped with:** lastrum storm bolter; solerite power gauntlet.

wargear.en: Any number of models can each have their solerite power gauntlet replaced with 1 solerite power talon.
Any number of models can each have their lastrum storm bolter replaced with one of the following: ◦ 1 infernus firepike ◦ 1 twin adrathic destructor

fluff.en: Aquilon Custodians are the heavy assault infantry of the Custodian Guard, each warrior imbued with armour and wargear of ancient provenance and impeccable craftsmanship. Encased within flexible but highly durable Aquilon-pattern Terminator armour, they stride through the most perilous war zones to mete out death.

description.en: Each time this model ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit it moved over during that move. Until the end of the turn, models in that unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover. In addition, roll one D6 for each model in that unit: for each 6, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound.
While this model has 1-7 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** 2 arachnus heavy blaze cannons; arachnus magna-blaze cannon; armoured hull.

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: The Ares Gunship first earned its reputation on Ancient Terra, and has quashed the Emperor’s enemies on hundreds of worlds since. Most terrifying of the Ares’ offensive capabilities is the arachnus magna-blaze cannon, whose extreme energies can pierce the densest armour, leaving a trail of wrecks and corpses wherever the Ares deploys.

description.en: While this model is leading a unit, you can re‑roll Charge rolls made for that unit.
Once per battle, in your Charge phase, this model’s unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with**: vaultswords.

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: A Blade Champion’s role is to identify the greatest battlefield threat then ensure its swift destruction. They are well‑equipped for the task, wielding crackling archeotech blades in a variety of combat styles – Behemor, Hurricanis and Victus – each perfect for dealing with a different kind of foe.

leader.en: This model can be attached to the following units:  ■ **CUSTODIAN GUARD** ■ **CUSTODIAN GUARD WITH ADRASITE AND PYRITHITE SPEARS** ■ **CUSTODIAN WARDENS** ■ **SAGITTARUM CUSTODIANS**

description.en: Each time this model makes an attack with its twin iliastus accelerator cannon that targets an enemy unit (excluding **MONSTERS** and **VEHICLES**), that attack has the **[LETHAL HITS]** ability. Each time this model makes an attack with its twin arachnus heavy blaze cannon that targets an enemy **MONSTER** or **VEHICLE** unit, that attack has the **[LETHAL HITS]** ability.
While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** twin iliastus accelerator cannon; twin lastrum bolt cannon; armoured hull.

wargear.en: This model’s twin iliastus accelerator cannon can be replaced with 1 twin arachnus heavy blaze cannon.

fluff.en: The Caladius Grav-tank fuses some of the heaviest firepower in the Custodian Guard arsenal with a highly mobile, resilient chassis. Taking as its principal armament either a twin iliastus accelerator cannon or a twin arachnus heavy blaze cannon, the Caladius excels in a range of battlefield roles, far outmatching more primitive vehicles of its class.

description.en: Each time this model is selected to fight, you can select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of it and roll one D6, adding 2 to the result if this model made a Charge move this turn: on a 4-5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6+, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** 2 lastrum storm bolters; Achillus dreadspear.

wargear.en: This model’s 2 lastrum storm bolters can be replaced with one of the following: ◦ 2 infernus incinerators ◦ 2 twin adrathic destructors ◦ 1 lastrum storm bolter and 1 infernus incinerator ◦ 1 lastrum storm bolter and 1 twin adrathic destructor ◦ 1 infernus incinerator and 1 twin adrathic destructor

fluff.en: The Contemptor-Achillus adds still greater refinement to an already celebrated blueprint – the revered Contemptor Dreadnought – arming its occupant with a mighty dreadspear equally capable of searing through foes at range or vanquishing them with a single thrust of its glowing blade.

description.en: Each time a melee attack targets this model, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: Like the Sentinel Guard of the ancient Legio Custodes, the Contemptor-Galatus is armed with a power blade and battle shield, albeit of a type greatly superior in size and potency. Coupled with the already resilient Contemptor chassis, this wargear enables the Galatus to stride through the inferno of battle with impunity, slaying elite infantry and crippling vehicles.

description.en: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit that was hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly model that disembarked from this **TRANSPORT** this turn makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.
While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

fluff.en: Coronus Grav-carriers are the primary tactical transports of the Adeptus Custodes. Their repulsor suspensor technology and flare shielding grants them the speed and survivability to engage or evade myriad threats at will, punishing targets with their potent turret weapons as they speed their elite passengers to the forefront of battle.

transport.en: This model has a transport capacity of 8 **ADEPTUS CUSTODES INFANTRY** models.

Once per battle, in your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, it can shoot again.
Add 1 to the bearer’s Wounds characteristic.
Add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in the bearer’s unit.

wargear.en: 1 model’s guardian spear can be replaced with 1 vexilla, 1 misericordia and 1 praesidium shield.
Any number of models can each have their guardian spear replaced with 1 sentinel blade and 1 praesidium shield.

fluff.en: These warriors form the backbone of the shield companies, and every one is a terrifying force of destruction equal to the strongest of the foe. Whether armed with guardian spear or sentinel blade, their shots are perfectly placed, and every cut, thrust and parry is a masterclass in bladesmanship.

While guardian spears are the most recognisable of these potent devices, for specialised tasks the bolt weapons they mount can be exchanged for the adrathic destructors of adrasite spears or the melta beams of pyrithite spears.

With frightening intensity and wills of iron, these warriors cleave their foes in two with immense sweeps of their energised spear and axe blades.

fluff.en: Knight‑Centuras are the leaders of Sisters of Silence cadres and the guardians of their traditions. They have earned the respect of their Sisters through their years of service, impeccable fighting skills, prowess and control as Nulls and encyclopaedic knowledge of how best to hunt the witch and the sorcerer.

fluff.en: The heavily armoured Orion is a superlative assault craft designed to weather attacks while it deploys its formidable cargo of Custodian Guard. With bolt and energy weapons blazing, the Orion swiftly clears a landing zone and unleashes its passengers, before soaring skyward to rain death upon any other threats that enter its sights.

fluff.en: Designed as a highly manoeuvrable hunter-killer, the Pallas Grav-attack provides the Adeptus Custodes with a rapid strike capacity, using its agility and versatile twin arachnus blaze cannon to inflict devastating hit-and-run assaults on the enemy, or to hunt down fleeing targets that have evaded Custodes ground troops.

fluff.en: Protected from the malevolence of witches by their rare anti-psychic mutation, and shielded from the bullets and blades of the foe by their finely crafted power armour, Prosecutors advance unflinching into the heart of battle. Their bolters thunder ceaselessly, each explosive shell ending another heretic life.

description.en: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit (excluding **MONSTERS** and **VEHICLES**) hit by one or more of those attacks. loadout.en: **Every model is equipped with:** adrastus bolt caliver; misericordia.

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: In contrast with most warriors of the Adeptus Custodes, the Sagittarum Guard specialise in the slaying of foes at range, laying down fearsome volleys from their adrastus bolt calivers or using the same weapons to obliterate closer threats with pinpoint disintegration beams, switching between firing modes with faultless skill.

description.en: Once per battle, when this model’s unit is selected to fight, it can use this ability. If it does, until that fight is resolved, both Ka’tah Stances are active for that unit, instead of only one.
Once per battle round, one unit from your army with this ability can use it when it is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that usage of that Stratagem by 1CP.
Add 1 to the bearer’s Wounds characteristic.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with**: guardian spear.

wargear.en: This model’s guardian spear can be replaced with one of the following:  ◦ 1 castellan axe ◦ 1 sentinel blade ◦ 1 sentinel blade and 1 praesidium shield ◦ 1 pyrithite spear and 1 praesidium shield

fluff.en: Shield‑Captains are among the greatest warriors in the Imperium. No matter which weapons they wield, they display absolute mastery of them. Their tactical and strategic abilities are superlative, and they read the ebb and flow of a war at a glance before directing their forces accordingly.

leader.en: This model can be attached to the following units:  ■ **CUSTODIAN GUARD** ■ **CUSTODIAN GUARD WITH ADRASITE AND PYRITHITE SPEARS** ■ **CUSTODIAN WARDENS** ■ **SAGITTARUM CUSTODIANS**

description.en: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, each time an attack is allocated to this model, change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 1.
Once per battle round, one unit from your army with this ability can use it when it is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that usage of that Stratagem by 1CP.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with**: balistus grenade launcher; guardian spear.

wargear.en: This model’s guardian spear can be replaced with 1 castellan axe.

fluff.en: A Shield-Captain is already one of the most formidable combatants and superlative strategists in the Imperium. When clad in a nigh-on impenetrable suit of auramite Terminator armour, they become more powerful still – a walking fortress of Imperial might able to shrug off even the most dolorous blows.

leader.en: This model can be attached to the following units:  ■ **ALLARUS CUSTODIANS** ■ **AQUILON CUSTODIANS**

description.en: Once per battle, at the end of the Fight phase, if this model’s unit has fought this phase, if it is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Fall Back move or, if it is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move.
Once per battle round, one unit from your army with this ability can use it when it is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that usage of that Stratagem by 1CP.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with**: salvo launcher; interceptor lance.

wargear.en: This model’s salvo launcher can be replaced with 1 Vertus hurricane bolter.

fluff.en: All Shield‑Captains are decisive warriors who suffer no impediment to their mission, but those swiftest in thought and action soar into battle on Dawneagle jetbikes. They plunge into the heart of the enemy lines to reap a tally with their interceptor lances before arcing away on screaming grav‑engines to strike again elsewhere.

leader.en: This model can be attached to the following units:  ■ **AGAMATUS CUSTODIANS** ■ **VERTUS PRAETORS**

description.en: Each time an attack is allocated to this model, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.
If this model is equipped with 2 Telemon caestus weapons in addition to its armoured feet weapon, add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of those Telemon caestus weapons.
While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** 2 iliastus accelerator culverins; spiculus bolt launcher; armoured feet.

wargear.en: This model’s 2 iliastus accelerator culverins can be replaced with one of the following: ◦ 2 arachnus storm cannons ◦ 2 Telemon caestus and 2 twin plasma projectors ◦ 1 iliastus accelerator culverin and 1 arachnus storm cannon ◦ 1 iliastus accelerator culverin, 1 Telemon caestus and 1 twin plasma projector ◦ 1 arachnus storm cannon, 1 Telemon caestus and 1 twin plasma projector

fluff.en: The honour of interment within a Telemon Heavy Dreadnought falls to the most lauded of Custodians, whose battle prowess is deemed a match for the Telemon’s sheer power. Encased within, such souls fight on alongside their brethren, whether surging forward with righteous fury or repelling assaults with their spiculus bolt launcher.

description.en: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in this unit makes an attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to that attack’s Ballistic skill or Weapon skill characteristics and/or all modifiers to the Hit roll.

Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, you can select one of the following to take effect until the end of the phase:

■ This model’s Watcher’s Axe melee weapon has an Attacks characteristic of 12.
■ This model has a 2+ invulnerable save.
If this model is in your army, it must be your **WARLORD**.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with**: Eagle’s Scream; Watcher’s Axe.

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: Trajann Valoris’ warrior prowess approaches that of the Primarchs of old. With the Watcher’s Axe he can bisect the sarcophagus of a Chaos Helbrute in a single swing, or use its built-in bolt weapon – known as Eagle’s Scream – to cut down enemy infantry with salvoes of adamantine-tipped penetrator bolts.

leader.en: This model can be attached to the following units:  ■ **CUSTODIAN GUARD** ■ **CUSTODIAN GUARD WITH ADRASITE AND PYRITHITE SPEARS** ■ **CUSTODIAN WARDENS** ■ **SAGITTARUM CUSTODIANS**

description.en: While this model is leading a unit, each time a melee attack targets that unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.
Once per battle, after making a Hit roll, Wound roll or saving throw for this model, you can change the result of that roll to an unmodified 6.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with**: Gnosis.

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: A headstrong warrior, Valerian is relatively new to the Custodes, but is already marked for greatness. His urge to bring death to the foes of the Emperor beyond Terra is much valued in these dark times, and countless enemies have fallen to his guardian spear, Gnosis.

leader.en: This model can be attached to the following units:  ■ **CUSTODIAN GUARD** ■ **CUSTODIAN GUARD WITH ADRASITE AND PYRITHITE SPEARS** ■ **CUSTODIAN WARDENS** ■ **SAGITTARUM CUSTODIANS**

description.en: This unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.
Once per battle, you can target this unit with the Rapid Ingress Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this phase.
The bearer has a Wounds characteristic of 4
This unit cannot embark within a **VENERABLE LAND RAIDER**.

loadout.en: **Every model is equipped with:** Venatari lance.

wargear.en: Any number of models can each have their Venatari lance replaced with 1 kinetic destroyer and 1 tarsus buckler.

fluff.en: The role of Venatari Custodian is vaunted as a high honour within the Adeptus Custodes, bestowed upon those with the most aquiline combat senses. These airborne hunting squads make masterful use of their archeotech jump packs to strike from the skies, swooping into the enemy’s midst to deliver swift ruin with their pistols and polearms.

description.en: The first time this model is destroyed, remove it from play without resolving its Deadly Demise ability. Then, at the end of the phase, roll one D6: on a 2+, set this model back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with D6 wounds remaining.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with**: combi-bolter; multi-melta; Contemptor combat weapon.

wargear.en: This model’s multi-melta can be replaced with 1 Kheres-pattern assault cannon.

fluff.en: These towering combat walkers are piloted by centuries-old fallen heroes kept alive by irreplaceable technologies. Equipped with weapons that can melt armour and tear apart infantry, Venerable Contemptor Dreadnoughts inflict terrible damage, all while protected by atomantic shields and auto-repair protocols.

description.en: Each time a unit disembarks from this model after it has made a Normal move, that unit is still eligible to declare a charge this turn.
While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with**: 2 godhammer lascannons; twin heavy bolter; armoured tracks.

wargear.en: This model can be equipped with 1 storm bolter.
This model can be equipped with 1 hunter-killer missile.

fluff.en: Land Raiders are heavily armed, mobile fortresses. Possessed of hyper-durable adamantine armour and a fearsome array of weapons, they and their cargo of Custodian warriors can turn the tide of war in a single salvo, and their machine spirits are so potent they can fight on even if the crew are slain.

transport.en: This model has a transport capacity of 6 **ADEPTUS CUSTODES INFANTRY** models.

description.en: Each time this unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in this unit.

Once per battle, after this unit ends a Normal or Advance move, you can select one enemy unit (excluding **MONSTERS** and **VEHICLES**) that it moved over during that move, then roll one D6 for each model in this unit: for each 2+, that enemy unit suffers 2 mortal wounds.

loadout.en: **Every model is equipped with**: salvo launcher; interceptor lance.

wargear.en: Any number of models can each have their salvo launcher replaced with 1 Vertus hurricane bolter.

fluff.en: Veteran warriors who have seen battle on a hundred worlds, these Custodians know that the value of speed is in directing their might precisely where and when it is needed most. Master combatants and marksmen both, they can place piercing strikes and deadly salvoes with precision even when travelling at immense speeds.

description.en: Models in this unit have the Feel No Pain 3+ ability against Psychic Attacks and mortal wounds.
Each time a melee attack targets this unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

loadout.en: **Every model is equipped with**: executioner greatblade.

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: The surest way to bring an end to a witch’s malefic rampage is to strike their head from their body. Such is the doctrine of the Vigilators, who ghost across the battlefield before charging headlong into battle, their double-handed power blades singing a keening song of death.

description.en: Models in this unit have the Feel No Pain 3+ ability against Psychic Attacks and mortal wounds.
In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. That enemy unit must take a Battle‑shock test.

loadout.en: **Every model is equipped with**: Witchseeker flamer; close combat weapon.

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: Witchseekers wield sanctified flamers as they hunt witches through tangled corridors and muddy trenchworks alike. Closing with their heretical quarry, they unleash a roaring conflagration to immolate the foe as effectively as would any witch‑burning pyre. Those not immediately incinerated are instead sent fleeing in abject terror.
